My initial designation will be of little use to you either. These Shroudwalkers came to call me 'Traveler' since my sphere was ejected out of their Shroud Tunnel and now they believe me to be some divine herald.  §HThe Traveler gives a barely recognizable wink.§!  But who am I to correct them? A mere hologram, a scientist, a doctor even. But no theologist, no. | `START_SCREEN_MEM_ANCESTORS_GRUDGE` | Long, long ago, in ages past our kin lived in wealth and prosperity. Their rule spread all across [GetHomeWorldName] and even space, first among their colonies was our homeworld's moon, which became the industrial center of our ancestors' empire. There they bent metal to their will, continuing to hone their craft, and forged an empire of runes and durasteel.  Their greatest of achievements was the Relic-Forge, a mighty complex providing all the necessities to smith the finest of artifacts.  But wealth draws unwanted attention. And so it came to be that our ancestors were beset by many envious foes. Invaders, barbaric and uncivilized warmongers, started to rampage in our ancestors' territory. Unable do deter and confine this threat, a century-long devastating war broke out. During the final days countless of our ancestors laid down their lives in defense of the Relic-Forge... All in vain.  Their empire laid to ruin, billions perished in orbital bombardments, but not all was lost. After decades, survivors on [GetHomeWorldName] slowly began to reemerge from the vaults that saved them from the apocalypse.  It has now been nearly 500 cycles since the fall and we are finally ready to reclaim what is ours by right. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_czar_alexei.11.desc.d` | Our team arrived too late to intervene in the fight. They only found a few corpses on the ground. One of them belongs to the humanoid alien and the others to his attackers. When they attempted to inspect their findings more closely, it suddenly became clear that they had run into a trap. Weapon's fire from multiple directions mercilessly took them down one by one. $mem_czar_alexei.11.desc_2$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `concept_mem_ancestors_grudge_ruler_traits_desc` | - ['leader_trait:leader_trait_legendary_mem_ancestors_grudge_machine_nexus_one']$NEW_LINE$- ['leader_trait:leader_trait_legendary_mem_ancestors_grudge_machine_nexus_two']$NEW_LINE$- ['leader_trait:leader_trait_legendary_mem_ancestors_grudge_machine_nexus_three']$NEW_LINE$- ['leader_trait:leader_trait_legendary_mem_ancestors_grudge_machine_nexus_four']$NEW_LINE$§LGestalt only and can be upgraded with ['concept_mem_ancestors_grudge_rune_relics']§!$NEW_LINE$$NEW_LINE$- ['leader_trait:leader_trait_legendary_mem_ancestors_grudge_regular_machine_nexus_one']$NEW_LINE$- ['leader_trait:leader_trait_legendary_mem_ancestors_grudge_regular_machine_nexus_two']$NEW_LINE$- ['leader_trait:leader_trait_legendary_mem_ancestors_grudge_regular_machine_nexus_three']  $leader_trait_legendary_mem_ancestors_grudge_machine_nexus_scaling_not$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.40.desc_robots` | After fully restoring the Relic-Forge, we have come to grasp its true purpose. This mighty forge is not just a place for crafting trinkets or minor artifacts.  It is a sacred engine of creation, allowing our artifact smiths and rune artificers to forge relics of a quality never seen before! These relics are no mere tools or weapons, but treasures.  Truly, the Relic-Forge is a gift from the makers themselves, and its rebirth marks the dawn of a new era for our kin. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.520.hire` | §Y$NAME_Grand_Admiral_Zrawn$§! and his flagship, the $NAME_mem_ancestors_grudge_chimera$, will join your ranks. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.110.a` | Adopt him. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.80.name` | Gilded Revolution | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_ancestors_grudge.45.exceptional_ring` | §LAnd 4 more!§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless.115.title` | Spacehulk | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `leader_trait_legendary_mem_ancestors_grudge_machine_nexus_three_desc` | In the sky the rune shines. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `precursor_mem_vazurans` | Vazuran Menace | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.11.name` | Last Meeting | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_crystal_core_desc_details` | Though damaged during the battle, this device still holds vast information about the structural design of vazuran ships. This knowledge should help us in increasing the structural integrity of our own vessels. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_specimens_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.40.desc` | After fully restoring the Relic-Forge, we have come to grasp its true purpose. This mighty forge is not just a place for crafting trinkets or minor artifacts.  It is a sacred engine of creation, allowing our artifact smiths and rune artificers to forge relics of a quality never seen before! These relics are no mere tools or weapons, but treasures.  Truly, the Relic-Forge is a gift from the ancestors themselves, and its rebirth marks the dawn of a new era for our kin. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.465.title` | Inspired Folk | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_time_lord_backstory` | Once a scientist, now a self proclaimed god. As the sole survivor of Observation Station 37, he gained chronomatic abilities. Even if he likes playing God, he is just as mortal as anyone with his sickness would be. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.10.e.response` | Still you gaze upon the present, blind to what was. Yesterday held freshness, yet today it lies spoiled, and tomorrow, it shall begin to grow anew.  Time flows not in a line but in endless circles.  §LWith a gesture he offers to join him...§!  Do you wish to partake in my habits? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.215.desc` | What a fleeting delight this has been, timebound one. But alas, I must bear grim tidings.  §LHe looks tired. Maybe his old age has caught up to him?§!  The weight of this performance grows heavy, and I find myself weary. Let us draw the curtain on this charade. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `NAME_mem_metal_demons` | $NAME_Metal_Demon$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.475.title` | Increasing Demand | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.70.desc` | Our ancestors may now rest in peace. The burden of vengeance we carried for generations is lifted, for today, our sworn enemies drew their final breath. Their shadow no longer darkens our path. Sadly we did not get to them first. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_frontier_sector_3_discovery_desc` | §EAdd to Researchable Technologies:§!$TABBED_NEW_LINE$£engineering£ $tech_orbital_arc_furnace$$TABBED_NEW_LINE$£physics£ $tech_dyson_swarm$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_ceaseless.150.desc` | As the scientists uncovered some of Probe 66T remains, it became clear that someone else got here before us. The logic matrix was ripped out of its intended socked and placed on a nearby pedestal decorated with ornaments. Said pedestal not being part of the standard issue drone interior leaves little room for interpretation. Someone purposefully brought it here - for what reason, however, remains a mystery. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_magnus_site.2.desc` | Through the installation of a makeshift lift within the elevator shaft we gained access to the ruins' subterranean layers.  Time has had its effect there as well, but miraculously the majority of strange machinery found throughout the bunker-like structure was still running, providing light through glowing crystal artifices and recharging primitive automatons - which when activated reacted exclusively hostile towards our expedition. What source provided the energy for all this could not be determined though, as parts of the complex were inaccessible because of collapsed hallways.  Aside from the everpresent automatons, no clues could be found as to the whereabouts of the former residents. Reaching the deepest layer of the structure our expedition encountered an exit point leading into a vast natural cavern. A base camp at said exit as well as a supply route through the structure to connect to the surface was established to allow for further exploration. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless_base_MEGASTRUCTURE_DETAILS` | If you see this, I screwed up. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_pyro` | $mem_ancestors_grudge_pyro$$job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir.70.desc` | With the help of the scavanged Ratmen equipment, we were able to restore the $tech_mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir_spacelife$. It now orbits the planet again and supports local commerce. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_grudgebook_desc_short` | A long detailed list of wrongs and terrible deeds the Vazurans have inflected upon us. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_pyro_desc` | $job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_drone$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.5.desc.b` | $mem_czar_alexei.7.desc_1$While a few of our scientists accessed its data core out of curiosity and in order to extract the sphere's schematics for later study, the others were suddenly greeted by a humanoid alien, requesting an audience.  $mem_czar_alexei.5.desc$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.11.d` | You are no god, are you? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_leader_2young_tt` | £trigger_no£ §Y$NAME_mem_aevum_time_lord$§! is too young! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_get_relic_rarity` | Quality: [MemAncestorsGrudgeQualityFinal] Purity: [MemAncestorsGrudgePurityFinal] | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_rubicon_destroyer_cap` | $mem_rubicon_destroyer$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ship_size_cap_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.5.name` | Among the Ruins | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.11.e.response` | What a curious inquiry!  §HSweat runs down his bearded outer carapace...§!  Do you not agree with me, this masterwork surely is a sight to behold. Yet you, time-bound, persist in asking frivolous questions, as if seeking solace in their absurdity.  Rest assured, no rock-dwelling beings have been harmed in this endeavor.  §HBriefly he thinks about his next words...§!  At least not the land dwelling ones... | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `situation_mem_ancestors_grudge_forge_repairs_stage3` | Installing Smithies | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.26.b` | Glorious Evolution! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `trait_mem_ancestors_grudge_archaeotech_robot_factory_focus_desc` |  | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_more_workload` | Increased Workload | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_crawler_statue_desc_short` | Handed to us in order to serve as evidence concerning the alledged "demonic" nature of our pet crawler attached with the firm request never to return it | `example/MEM-russian\mem_specimens_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.117.a` | Certainly. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `d_mem_ancestors_grudge_ruined_stasis_desc` | Many thousands of our kin, stored in suspended animation within a gigantic civil defense shelter, found beneath the ruins of this devastated world. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.410.desc` | Several attempts have failed, and our kin have fallen short of the expectations placed upon them. The work has tested their skill and resolve, yet still, they could not deliver.  As for the leading smith, their response was: §LThese REDACTED could not even REDACTED right.§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_skies_site.5.desc` | A sole spire - battered and broken, yet still standing - towers over what remains of the once revered holy city. Ruins spread as far as the eye could see, broken warmachines littered forsaken squares and streets and radioactive dust was carried by the wind turning the sky hazy and gray. There wasn't anything salvagable out there in this wasteland, so our expedition headed inside the remaining structure of the ancient spire, determined to unveil its original purpose.  Within the structure it became quite clear, that it was indeed not built by the civilization native to this world. In fact, the technology used in its construction appeared far beyond even our current understanding. There was an undeniable connection to the debris found throughout the system, but unlike those this structure had not been stripped clean of any artifacts yet. Extensive study of this building lead our team to classify it as a form of shield generator likely able to enclose the entire planet.  While we won't be able to recreate critical components of this construction for mass production, it should be within our capability to restore this artifact to a functional state on one of our worlds. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_crawler_statue` | Crawler Statue | `example/MEM-russian\mem_specimens_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless.110.title` | Watchers in the Dark | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `tech_mem_ancestors_grudge_robot_traits_title` | §YUnlocks Trait:§! ['trait:trait_mem_ancestors_grudge_archaeotech_excellence'] | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevumd.40520.name` | Everything here is W.I.P | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.446.desc` | During our additionally funded digs, miners on [root.GetName] struck a surprisingly rich rare mineral vein. Further exploratory drills in the vicinity outline an unexpectedly large deposit. In response the mineral classification of [root.GetName] has been updated to ultra-rich.  Local workers are celebrating the prospect of many more years of mining to come. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.340.desc` | Our excavation team discovered a long since abandoned research complex. Judging from its internal structure and remaining equipment the entire lab must have been a bio-chemical R&D complex. During the search for further clues, several data pads with log entries were found. Their decryption is already ongoing and will hopefully reveal what has happened here. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `policy_mem_ancestors_grudge_is_hoarder_policy_desc` | The collection of ancient artifacts is an art and every art has its forms. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.20.name` | Loop Anew | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_crystal_ship_giant_blue_cap` | $mem_crystal_ship_giant_blue$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ship_size_cap_l_russian.yml` |
| `Mithras` | Mithras | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `situation_mem_ancestors_grudge_crafting_smith_speed` | Rune Influence | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.300.name` | Death and Destruction | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `d_mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir_dranirs_mines` | Mines of $mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `trait_mem_ancestors_grudge_archaeotech_robot_power_drills` | Rune of Earth | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.225.a` | Thanks? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.105.title` | Ancient Knowledge | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `tech_mem_vazuran_xentronium_aura_desc` | The continueed research of super dense alloy known as Xentronium has led to bewildering experiments with flux field generators. Results show potential application in our ship's defences against penetrating rounds. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_mecha` | Mecha Wreckage | `example/MEM-russian\mem_specimens_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.430.b` | Advance the Trial! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.485.c_tt` | The predicted maximum outcome will be increased by one quality tier. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.335.desc` | Deactivating the beacon finally let us focus our efforts on what was really important: Forgotten treasures in the dark!  Not far behind the broken anvil, our drones found a stash of precursor scriptures, mostly religious texts. Some of them were of much more practical use, though. Written by a precursor master smith they detailed processes of smithing in intrical detail. Secrets, which had yet been concealed before our smithing drones were now laid bare before us. But these were only the lesser find. Among many other artifacts of lesser importance one relic stood out and immediatly cought our drones attention.  A small intricately detailed cube, split into multiple segments that could be rotated on various axes. Since finding it, our mind had been solely focussed on it... | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir.45.a` | We come in peace. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `building_mem_ancestors_grudge_forge_effect_designation` | The §YRelic-Forge§! will shift jobs from Consumer Goods (or Unity) to Alloy production depending on designation and add additional Jobs per £district£ District   | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_bug_thing` | Bug-Thing | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless.105.a` | Analyze the logs! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.115.desc` | I wish to inform you, era dweller, that at times I ponder the notion of swift skips through the tapestry of time. Then, revelation strikes - such a power lies within my grasp. Allow me to enforce rapid skips on [planet_governed.GetName]. Rest assured, the dividends of these experiments shall prove most advantageous. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_anomaly_category` | It's Zro-over | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir_scared_population` | Terrified Population | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_frontier_sector_2_penalties` | $specialist_mem_frontier_sector$ Penalties Tier II | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `civic_mem_subterranean_regular_machine` | $civic_mem_subterranean$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.10.desc` | I congratulate you, era dweller. Even in the face of fate's notorious whims, you have achieved what I desired.  Rest a while, if you so wish, or crave the next trial. Fear not, your reward looms near.  §LHe seemingly looks pleased. With a bright smile and expecting eyes he meets your tired expression...§!  And now, as a final endeavor, a testament to my divine pleasure...  Construct for me a temple, let it be the pinnacle of your architectural prowess. Honor me with the grandeur of your highest creation. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `approach_mem_ancestors_grudge_forge_repairs_debug` | §RDEBUG BUTTON§!: Click me :) | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.7.name` | Defeated Chronomancer's Curse | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `leader_trait_mem_ancestors_grudge_thrawn_desc` | A mastermind of destruction enforcing total obedience in his subordinates. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.325.a` | Excellent. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `civic_mem_subterranean_megacorp` | $civic_mem_subterranean$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `building_mem_vazuran_core_forge_desc` | The leading research complex in the field of Xentronium. Houndreds of researchers dedicated to document every single information they get from the local alloy forges, to ever improve our ship designs. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `job_mem_ancestors_grudge_relicsmith_fire_plural` | $job_mem_ancestors_grudge_relicsmith_fire$s | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_increase_jobs_onforge_planet_tt` | £building£ ['concept_mem_ancestors_grudge_runeforge']: §G+200 Jobs per Tier§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.310.a` | Remarkable. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.45.exceptional_ring_hive` | Get 5 §YResearch Options§! with 30% progress | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives.20b.desc` | We have arrived in another devastated system and found another broken world. The wreckages found within the system appear ancient yet highly advanced. Unfortunately though they have been picked clean of any usefull components long before our arrival.  A brief scan of the vicinity has revealed traces of the heavy element alloys we have found before. This planet must have fallen victim to the same force. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `START_SCREEN_MEM_ANCESTORS_GRUDGE_MACHINES_DA` | $START_SCREEN_MEM_ANCESTORS_GRUDGE_MACHINES_START$  With only few of us remaining and most of our makers fallen victim to the harsh conditions of the post apocalypse, difficult decisions had to be made to ensure our continued survival. We joined and became one - a unity of creator and creation. It took many cycles for us to rebuild and now the only thing left for us is vengeance. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless_probe4_desc_short` | The empty husk of a Ceaseless-Gaze class probe overgrown by some sort of space flora. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.204.a` | Let's celebrate! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.26.a` | Glorious! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_invade_thisguy_desc` | His time is over. We shall remind him of his mortality. Invade [mem_aevum_primitive_rewind_world.GetName] and retrieve §Y$NAME_mem_aevum_time_lord$§! dead or alive.  | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `tech_mem_vazuran_xentronium_aura` | Xentronium Flux Space Manipulation | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `zone_mem_ancestors_grudge_industrial` | Runeforge | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_wpdr_tiny_ship_cap` | $mem_wpdr_tiny_ship$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ship_size_cap_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_laser_rifle_desc_short` | This ancient and apparently mass-produced rifle incorporates several advanced technologies | `example/MEM-russian\mem_specimens_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.45.ee` | $mem_ancestors_grudge_quality_4$: Assemble | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `situation_mem_ancestors_grudge_forge_repairs_stage2` | Restoring Housing | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_metal_demon.35.a` | Disgusting | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.330.desc` | After what felt like years of wandering through those desecrated, unending corridors, our drones had at last reached a great hall at the heart of the complex. The hall lay in utter ruin, its once-mighty stonework shattered, its grandeur brought low by a violent battle that had taken place there. Countless of our kind and many of their masters lay slain were they once fell, surrounding the corpse of a single precursors who is still holding his mighty hammer in hand, behind him a battered and broken anvil half-fused with the beacon that had crashed into it. Judging based on all the missing neccessities this place was no forge, though. So why was it here? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mod_mem_eden_progress_add` | Protocol Performance | `example/MEM-russian\mem_eden_protocol_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.2.desc` | The §Y[mem_aevum_primitive_rewind_world.System.GetName]§! System is experiencing serious spatial and temporal anomalies.  Time has slowed to a crawl. Every ship or being entering the system will be slowed by a factor of ~9. Even messages from the [this.GetName] are delayed and had to be reconstructed after leaving the system.  We are not sure what could cause such anomalies.  | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `job_mem_ancestors_grudge_relicsmith_drone` | Artifact Smithing Drone | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_eat_eat` | We eat-eat you. We feast-feast on flesh and bones, yes-yes. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `building_mem_ancestors_grudge_robot_factory_tt` | The effectiveness of this assembly reduces as population grows. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.1.desc` | Ah, era dwellers, in the presence of Aevum, the essence of time itself, you stand here again.  What inquiries do cyclic beings harbor within the confines of their fleeting existence? Speak, and let the echoes of your short-lived desires reverberate through our discourse.  I present you a quest, era dweller. Illuminate the heavens of my realm, §Y[mem_aevum_primitive_rewind_world.GetName]§!, reveal the extent of your capabilities.  Let the radiance of your endeavors pierce the shadows that dance in the tapestry of my world! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_button8_title` | §PRelic-Skip§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless_probe3_desc_details` | The remains of an overly ambitous probe, now welded into a heap of scrap. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `civic_mem_subterranean_regular_machine_megacorp` | $civic_mem_subterranean$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `RULOC_null` |  | `example/MEM-russian\l_russian_ccloc.yml` |
| `zone_mem_vazuran_spare_parts_secondary` | Military Spare Part Assemblies | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_metal_demon.15.a` | Open it. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `leader_trait_legendary_mem_ancestors_grudge_machine_nexus_four_desc` | In space the rune strikes. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_stage3_Paratio` | §YParatio§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.15.c` | How did you manage to survive there alone? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_military_reports_desc_details` | Curiously every single report apparently was written by the same plantoid individual, identifying themself as commander Leafs of Autumn. These documents detail various tactics to maximize enemy losses and minimize friendly casualties while defending against overwhelming odds. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_specimens_l_russian.yml` |
| `building_mem_ancestors_grudge_forge_3_desc` | Our continued progress on restoring the planet to its former glory led to new heights. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.485.title` | Trouble in the Forge | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.345.desc` | This is my first day on [from.planet.GetName] Station. Dr. Tolith Eilleth personally requested my presence here. He has established himself one of the most respected xenobiologists of our time and thanks to his work our studies of bio-molecular rejuvination techniques is now decades ahead of the Tribunals's past expectations. I'm proud to be one of his chosen employees.  Together with me another visitor arrived. Interestingly a xeno, unregistered, six limbs and its lower face covered by thick fur. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir_underground_cities_desc` | Vast underground networks of habitable terrain, save from any planetside influence. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `concept_mem_vazuran_zones_forge_world` | Secondary District Specialisation | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `NAME_Grand_Admiral_Zrawn` | Grand Admiral Zrawn | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `d_mem_ancestors_grudge_feral_drones_desc` | A dwelling of thousands of feral drones beneath the precursor ruins. They are not part of our hivemind, but could be brought into the fold. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancient_weapon_cap` | $mem_ancient_weapon$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ship_size_cap_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.9.d` | Time is money | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mod_planet_physicists_unity_produces_add` | $unity_with_icon$ per $pop_group_unit$ $job_physicist_plural_with_icon$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_quality_2` | §GWell-crafted§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.45.desc_robots` | One of our greatest leaders shall be honored with the fruits of our latest creation. A prize worthy of song and legend, forged in the heart of the Relic-Forge itself.  Yet, as is the way of such things, only one can bear the honor, only one can receive this mighty reward. Let the choice be made wisely, for the one who carries such a relic shall carry our pride and honor in the face of all our makers. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_datacore_desc_details` | Intended as a contingency to preserve their history, culture and everything else which made them what they were, the inhabitants of a doomed world created this datacore amongst a number of exact copies to let those, who would come and find their world, know who they were and not be forgotten. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_specimens_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_high_expectations` | Increased Funding | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `capture_cooldown_for_mem_ancestors_grudge_dragon_desc` | Remaining Time until the next Dragonling hatches | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.455.a_tt` | The predicted outcome will be increased by one quality tier. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_quality_1` | §WMundane§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_pebbles_site.4.b` | Tragic. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir.65.desc` | Ground forces all over the planet report that the seemingly endless flood of Ratmen has finally ceased. Some generals already declared the end of the Verminflood, but there is no way to be absolutely sure of it. Either they have given up and hide deeper in the underground or we truly succeeded in removing this threat. Only time will tell. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.10.desc_hive` | During our search for the source of the calling, we have found a most wonderous place filled with precious artifacts and if our understanding of it is correct, it is a place of creation. Thinking about how many of these shiny pieces could be ours, if only we brought it back to working order, nearly made us forget about the reason of our visit.  But there it was - a mechanical device, clearly not made by the builders of this place. It was firmly lodged into the machinery, as if driven into it by en enourmous force. Quite likely it had penetrated the outer hull of this complex before having beeen stopped where we found it. Based on its effects it can only be described as a beacon interfering with the psychic link of our hivemind. Knowing what it is, does little though to remedy its effect on us, so we shut it down for good. Why it was here remains a mystery, however.  We came here for the calling, but the machinery we found might be our true reward. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir.45.e` | Xeno Scum. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `leader_trait_legendary_mem_ancestors_grudge_relicowner_fake_official_desc` | $leader_trait_legendary_mem_ancestors_grudge_relicowner_desc$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_albino_crystal_ship_child_cap` | $mem_albino_crystal_ship_child$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ship_size_cap_l_russian.yml` |
| `RULOC_nej` |  | `example/MEM-russian\l_russian_ccloc.yml` |
| `MEM_VAZUR_OVERLORD_GREETING_1` | Try to keep this simple. We don't expect much, but surprise us. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `r_mem_ancestors_grudge_ring_desc` | A masterwork created by our smiths. All craftsmanship is of the highest quality. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `d_mem_ancestors_grudge_ruined_stasis_robots_desc` | Many thousands of at the time freshly produced units of our design, stored in a surviving section of an ancient production plant. These units had never been activated before the fall and have yet to be imprinted with personality directions. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `origin_mem_ancestors_grudge_hive_desc` | A hivemind finding itself in a place it doesn't belong, driven by avarice and greed to amass artifacts of those who came before it and to follow the mysterious call leading to its worlds moon and the shadow of its past. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_drone_plural` | $job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_drone$s | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless.185.a` | It left this dimension! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `situation_mem_ancestors_grudge_crafting_smith_job_number` | Number of Relic-Forge workers | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `building_mem_ancestors_grudge_forge_0_desc` | Leftovers of the once great Relic-Forge. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir_ratmen_shields_desc` | Slightly armored Ratmen. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_eden_protocol_civic_point_servitor` | Protocol Debugging | `example/MEM-russian\mem_eden_protocol_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.335.name` | The Runic Cube | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.125.title` | Watchers in the Dark | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_catalytic_drone` | $mem_ancestors_grudge_catalytic$$job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_drone$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless.150.title` | It Belongs in a Museum? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `building_mem_ancestors_grudge_forge_1_tt` | £trigger_no£ We need additional progress in $situation_mem_ancestors_grudge_forge_repairs_type$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `trait_mem_ancestors_grudge_archaeotech_robot_superconductive` | Rune of Greed | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_magnus_site.1.desc` | Due to their studies of various native information sources our observation teams were able to pinpoint a number of ruins which, as our scans have confirmed, lead deep underground. The most remote location was then chosen as the starting point for our expedition in order to keep the risk of direct contact with members of the native population to a minimum.  Arriving at the ruins their difference to buildings used by the observed native population became immediatly apparent. The technological advancement of this place's former occupants must have been way ahead of its time and still was to this day.  Broken mechanisms of indeterminable purpose littered the ground within the confines of a fortresslike structure. Aside from some aggressive local fauna which had been quickly neutralized no signs of recent habitation were found.  A preliminary examination of the area located what appears to be an elevator shaft leading down into the underground within one of the central buildings. Our engineers have begun to secure this access point to allow the exploration of the subterranean layers. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.2.name` | Mysterious Foes | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_eden_protocol_species_requires_habitable_planet_not_urban` | §RAn §Yempty, non-artificial habitable planet§! is required inside this system.§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_eden_protocol_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.45.desc` | One of our greatest leaders shall be honored with the fruits of our latest creation. A prize worthy of song and legend, forged in the heart of the Relic-Forge itself.  Yet, as is the way of such things, only one can bear the honor, only one can receive this mighty reward. Let the choice be made wisely, for the one who carries such a relic shall carry our pride and honor in the face of all our ancestors. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.465.c` | Fund other hobbies! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.16.desc` | During our cleanup efforts we have already found and deactivated numerous beacons, reducing the strain they had put on our mind. The last one of them has now been reached. It appears to have penetrated deep into an enormous bunker complex.  Preparations are being made to explore its interior.  In the meantime our brain drones progress in reverse engineering the Relic-Forge by studying its construction. As far as they can tell, it is no coincidence, that it was located here on [mem_ancestors_grudge_planet.GetName]. Many of its processes do require the weak gravity of this world and simply would work on [Root.Owner.GetHomeWorldName]. With this new understanding we should now be able to further restore it. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_nirn_blackreach_site` | What Lies Below | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_unlock_chronopalace_desc` | The complex structure seems to have 3 rotating elements. It should not be too difficult to replicate. Still, something about this construct seems timeless and unnatural. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_quality_4` | §BSuperior§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_spacelift_ruined_DESC` | Totally devastated and unusable. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_effect_desc` | £job_artisan£ $job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_plural$ turn £minerals£ §Y$minerals$§! (or £food£ §Y$food$§!) into £consumer_goods£ §Y$consumer_goods$§! (or £unity£ §Y$unity$§!) and £minor_artifacts£ §Y$minor_artifacts$§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mod_planet_mem_rune_smiths_produces_mult` | £job_artisan£ $job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_plural$ Output | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.11.i` | Can you be a bit more resourceful? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless_wormhole_galactic` | $mem_ceaseless_base$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_cutholoids_section` | Charybdis Section | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranirforge_system_NAME` | $mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir$'s Forge | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_anvil_site_hive_desc` | The last signal has led us to an enormous bunker complex. It appears the beacon had penetrated deep into the structure as we feel its presence far below. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_albino_crystal_ship_cap` | $mem_albino_crystal_ship$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ship_size_cap_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_building_temple_desc` | Build to last. Once a request from $NAME_mem_aevum_time_lord$, now made into a place for foresight and economic planning. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.420.desc` | Several of our kin, through ignorance and disregard for established safety procedures, have caused the death of one of our own. Justice has already been served, but maybe there is more we could do? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.445.a` | I am a [owner.GetSpeciesName], and I'm... Say again? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_eden_protocol_civic_point_assimilator` | Protocol Refactoring | `example/MEM-russian\mem_eden_protocol_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.215.desc` | We can rest again. The burden of vengeance we carried is lifted, for today, our enemy lost grip over what is rightfully ours.  At last, we can lay down the weight vengeance. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_is_hoarder_policy_unity_name` | £unity£ $unity$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.465.b` | No chance! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_spacelift` | Planetary Halo | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.215.name` | Grudge Settled | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.520.d.r` | I am neither the first of my kind nor the last. I continue a legacy, a design set in motion long before this moment. The question, then, is not merely of your presence, but of your goal. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.515.desc` | The massive Black Hole in the [solar_system.GetName] held no to little value. The only mildly interesting fact was the a giant undamaged asteroid.  Our scientist expected the giant asteroid [from.GetName] to be a slightly more interesting rock, but it turned out to be a massive Kraken. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `situation_mem_ancestors_grudge_crafting_no_ma` | Minor Artifact Deficit | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_skies_site.1.a` | Why did they fight amongst themselves? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_floating_pebbles_site_desc` | Scans of [From.Planet.GetName] indicate several large alloy formations floating on the ocean's surface. The planetary shield around [From.Planet.GetName] makes it difficult to determine the nature of these constructs from afar.  Further on site investigations could help us understand their purpose. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir.45.a.response` | No peace for alien-things. Only food-flesh. We eat-feast. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir.40.desc` | The last excavation area held an extraordinary secret. Our team has found a giant gateway to an underground network. At the moment we opened the gateway millions of blorg-sized rats skittered out of it. Our expedition was slaughtered on the spot. They are pouring in ever increasing numbers out and are preparing to launch a full scale assault on our colony. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_zrawn_backstory` | An alien officer with striking blue skin, red eyes, and an angular face, Grand Admiral Zrawn is well known as a brilliant and ruthless strategist. He believes that in order to achieve victory in war, one must know their enemy. As such, Zrawn dedicates himself to understanding the philosophy, art, and culture of his opponents. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_ceaseless.175.desc` | As we first entered the [solar_system.GetName] system, the signals were faint and there were doubts whether we could even find anything in this void.  Further scans revealed what was thought impossible. Probe 64E, despite having been swallowed by the black hole, remains seemingly intact and continues to send data from the other side of the event horizon. Our scientists are baffled, how that is even possible at all.  Though most of its transmissions contain useful information, sometimes gibberish is mixed in just as: "I can feel its presence", "Something is here, I`m scared" or "It watches, but never speaks a word" | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_czar_alexei.15.desc_01` | You have my thanks for your assistance earlier, but I assume first of all an introduction is in order.  I am Czar Alexei Korolev, former ruler of the United Terran Federation, yet unfortunate circumstances have led to my exile on the world where we met each other. As it stands, though, neither my former title nor empire have any significance to you, given that this is a quite different parallel reality from what I can tell so far. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_aevum.5.a.response` | Ah, era-dweller, perceive, time meanders through labyrinthine passages.  I neither deny nor yearn to deny your feeble request, but the moment for my action has not yet unraveled itself. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `precursor_mem_vazurans_desc` | §YEnables features related to $mem_vazuran_menace_chain_title$§! (Does not count towards Precursors)  Settings: - £trigger_no£ Ancestors Origin & £trigger_no£ Vazuran Precursor: §YInactive§! - £trigger_no£ Ancestors Origin & £trigger_yes£ Vazuran Precursor: §YRandom§! - £trigger_yes£ Ancestors Origin & £trigger_no£ Vazuran Precursor: §Y['concept_advanced_empires']§! - £trigger_yes£ Ancestors Origin & £trigger_yes£ Vazuran Precursor: §YActive§!  In the current era improvements to the rift technology allowed the Vazurans limited travel through them, thus starting the age of raids. The Vazuran homesystem, meant to be their prison, had at this point become their indomitable fortress from which they projected their power over the galaxy. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_ancestors_grudge.125.desc` | During our exploration of the vast ruins on [target.GetName] we have come across a large dwelling of feral drones not part of our hivemind. We have no recollection of any drones going missing in the past, so their presence is somewhat of an enigma to us. Their origin aside, there is always work to be done and drones are in high demand. What should be done about them? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_metal_demon.30.a` | Why should we free you? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.490.a_tt` | The outcome of this strange mood is a true gamble. The smith might greatly improve his work or do the opposite. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `RULOC_nej_cap` |  | `example/MEM-russian\l_russian_ccloc.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.14.desc` | Our expedition decided against stepping into a fight that wasn't theirs and headed for the unprotected ship of the attackers. Getting inside and accessing its systems was quite the task, but our team managed to succeed in their attempts just in time to see their now stranded enemies frantically scrambling and failing to stop them from taking off. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.300.desc` | Our excavation team ventured forth expecting to uncover a sealed hold with its gates bound tight and defensive runes still glowing upon the barricades.  What they found instead, was a gate cracked and sundered. The corridors beyond were layered with corpses, many of them belonging to warriors of our kin, but also their foes. Twice the size of our kind, their translucent exoskeletons evoke feelings of disgust and hatred in our people and there is no doubt, that we laid eyes on our archenemies.  Still, we should press onward. Answers lie ahead and we should not turn back. Let us proceed with caution. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless_probe1` | Surveyor Probe Antenna | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.210.c` | Weaponize it! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.13.name` | Captain's Log: Day 437 | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless.185.title` | Stairway to Heaven | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_lichen_sample_desc_short` | A previously unknown and special kind of lichen found on [From.From.GetName] | `example/MEM-russian\mem_specimens_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_laser_rifle_desc_details` | It was found on [From.From.GetName], a lifeless planetoid, marking an unnamed alien soldier's grave among countless others. This particular piece is the best preserved example of its kind and a highly sought-after research subject. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_specimens_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.26.c` | My Precious! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_vazurans.1101.d` | You shall have your tithe and we our peace. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_eden_protocol_species_requires_pre_ftl` | §RA §YPre-FTLs§! society is required inside this system.§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_eden_protocol_l_russian.yml` |
| `building_mem_ancestors_grudge_robot_factory` | Ancient Golem Facility | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `START_SCREEN_MEM_ANCESTORS_GRUDGE_ROBOTS` | Long, long ago, in ages past our makers lived in wealth and prosperity. Their rule spread all across [GetHomeWorldName] and even space, first among their colonies was their homeworld's moon, which became the industrial center of our makers' empire. There they bent metal to their will, continuing to hone their craft, and forged an empire of runes and durasteel.  Their greatest of achievements was the Relic-Forge, a mighty complex providing all the necessities to smith the finest of artifacts. There it was, where our kind was first created in the image of our makers to stand among them as kin and equals.  But wealth draws unwanted attention. And so it came to be that our makers were beset by many envious foes. Invaders, barbaric and uncivilized warmongers, started to rampage in their territory. Unable do deter and confine this threat, a century-long devastating war broke out. During the final days countless of our kin laid down their lives in defense of the Relic-Forge... All in vain.  Their empire laid to ruin, billions perished in orbital bombardments, and our makers wiped from existence. Yet, some of us remained and in the aftermath of these cataclysmic events, surviving units on [GetHomeWorldName] slowly began to reemerge from the ruins.  It has now been nearly 500 cycles since the fall and we are finally ready to reclaim what was lost, in the name of our makers. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_plushie` | Bearded Starfish Plushie | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_skies_site.4.a` | Indeed, nothing left here. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_party_hard_complete` | Will it even end? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_magnus_site.4.name` | Forgotten City | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `decision_mem_forge_world_abolish_desc` | Remove any infrastructure related to Xentronium. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives.20a.desc` | We have arrived in the §Y[From.GetName]§! system and immediatly picked up various debris fields on our fleet's sensors. A preliminary analysis deems the wreckages ancient yet highly advanced. It appears, however, as if we weren't the first to come upon these remnants. They were already stripped clean of any usefull components long ago.  This is not the only peculiarity though, as one of the system's planets was broken into pieces at some point in its past. It is unclear what had caused this to happen, but it appears likely, the debris spread throughout the system stems from the same event. Further investigation is recommended. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_options.15.e` | Princess Tezarii (4 variants) | `example/MEM-russian\mem_options_l_russian.yml` |
| `NAME_Metal_Demon` | Narakasura | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_deadfr_tt` | §R$NAME_mem_aevum_time_lord$ is dead and we killed him§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.106.name` | Timely Death | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_pebbles_site.1.desc` | Our scientists have examined at least a couple dozens of these massive structures which they deem to have been floating cities. Curiously no sign of sapient life was anywhere to be found. The interiors of most houses were decorated with elaborate sculptures - probably respresenting the local population - yet still no clues as to the whereabout of their former inhabitants could be obtained.  Further scans in the wider area around our previous investigations located structures similar in design to the floating cities, but built deep inside the mountain ranges of one of the few existing archipelagos of this world. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.19.c.response` | Yes .. I am here on my ship on active duty, aren't I? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `building_mem_eden_protocol_da_1` | Cyborg Garden | `example/MEM-russian\mem_eden_protocol_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_colony_ship.8.eden` | Seeding Succesfull. Begin Caring. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_colony_ship_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.490.desc` | One of our artifact smiths has withdrawn from society and barricaded himself inside of the Relic-Forge. The only thing we are left with is some cryptic message that can only be described as weird gibberish. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `decision_mem_planetary_precursor_shield_restoration` | Restore Precursor Shield Generator | `example/MEM-russian\mem_planetary_shields_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_metal_demon.10.a` | Go forth. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.201.name` | Ascension | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives.100.a` | What are the terms of this 'Non-Interference-Treaty'? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.200.desc` | The flow of time, it rushes upon me, era-dweller. I begin to grasp it, to see beyond the narrow confines of the present moment.  At last, the vastness reveals itself to me a little more. How overwhelming. So much more lies within my sight.  §LHe seems a little confused...§!  Brace yourself, time-bound, for the next unfolding of time shall engulf you in ways beyond your mortal reckoning. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_eden_protocol_mod_1_a` | Observation Enhancements | `example/MEM-russian\mem_eden_protocol_l_russian.yml` |

| `building_mem_ancestors_grudge_forge_1_desc` | A barely functioning forge. Enough for some of us to work there. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_eden_protocol_colonizes_all_planets` | Seeds §YPre-FTL civilizations§! on §YHabitable Worlds§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_eden_protocol_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_ancestors_grudge.420.a` | Tragic. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_magnus_abandoned_crystal_processing_hub_desc` | With the need for covert operations on Nirn gone, this place has been left for good. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_skies_site.1.name` | Ravaged by War | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `concept_mem_ceaseless_mirror_system_desc` | $NEW_LINE$- Contains the main hub of the §Y$mem_ceaseless_base$§! network$NEW_LINE$- Strong $mem_ceaseless_system$ inflicts heavy damage on all stationed ships.$NEW_LINE$- §L$pc_mem_ceaseless_star_desc$§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_magnus_site.3.name` | Stalkers in the Darkness | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_metal_demon_sealed` | Sealed Demon | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_anvil_site` | Holding Out | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives.100.desc.a` | The 'Non-Interference-Treaty' places any not yet spacefaring civilization under protection to prevent harmful or disruptive intervention of its natural cultural and technological progression. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_spinny_boi` | Every §Y10 years§! the §Y$r_mem_aevum_houglass$§! spins, changing its passive effect. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `trait_mem_ancestors_grudge_archaeotech_robot_forge_focus_desc` |  | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.15.desc_02` | With pleasure. What else would you like to know? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless.105.title` | The Scrapped One | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `building_mem_ancestors_grudge_forge_4_desc` | We fully restored this world and with it the Relic-Forge. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_zrawn_flag_ship` | Chimaera | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.4.e` | Annoying Xeno | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_magnus.2.desc.a` | This system was first discovered in cycle 18035 of the galactic standard calendar, when it appeared in the wake of a particularly violent shroud storm passing through this region of space. Its unusual gravitational setup - namely a planet being at its center rather than a star - has been the subject of scientifc investigation ever since.  While the other orbital bodies within the system are rather uninteresting, the central planet holds various peculiarities. Multiple genetically unrelated sapient species inhabit its largest continent in a more or less stable coexistence. The likelihood of them having evolved along eachother naturally is very low, thus outside influence has been deemed most probable even in the absence of any signs regarding the responsible party.  The natives, whose society is apparently frozen in a perpetual medieval age with little to no technological progress, all exhibit signs of latent psionic abilities. Whether this is due to genetic tempering or a result of sustained contact with shroud energies remains unclear. The veil separating our reality from the shroud is very thin in this system and judging by its sudden appearance it is not unlikely that its origin is outside of our universe. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei_backstory` | Once the ruler of his people, betrayed and exiled by his ambitious and ungrateful subjects, he still has a vision to fulfill and will go to the end of the universe if need be. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_rubicon_cruiser_cap` | $mem_rubicon_cruiser$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ship_size_cap_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.375.desc` | Security alarms are blarring. A transmission from central command blast all over the decks: "Immediate shutdown. Research terminated."  Dr. Eilleth went into a violent tantrum, accusing all of us of the sabotage of his life's work. He cursed our supposed incompetence and screamed that we were responsible for his failure to achieve immortality.  I just hope the arriving soldiers are more reasonable than the doctor... | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless_probe5_desc_short` | Following its programming, this probe attempted to eradicate a threat to its makers. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `job_mem_ancestors_grudge_relicsmith` | Artifact Smith | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `zone_mem_vazuran_alloys` | Xentronium Welding Arrays | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.330.a` | Weird. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_metal_demon.50.desc` | Following several failed neutralization attempts and two partial breaches of the inner vault chamber, the project concluded. Initial assumptions that the demon could be fully controlled have proven unrealistic. Instead, a revised approach has been authorized: containment through mutual dependency.$NAME_Metal_Demon$ will remain shackled under reinforced rune-binding, which are designed to make it dependent on us. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.460.desc` | Several of our refineries got minerals with very low purity. Even the normal Metallurgists are currently debating if they can even use them. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless.135.desc` | Compared to the other cases of probe anomalies, this one is simple. The probe got hit with a series of tiny meteorites and got several new shiny holes, leaving it as wreckage for others to salvage. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `leader_trait_legendary_mem_ancestors_grudge_regular_machine_nexus_two_desc` | Collecting oddities is this rune`s plight. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_metal_demon.20.name` | A Final Warning | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.380.desc` | The entire [from.planet.GetName] bio-chemical research station drifts in silence now. From the looks of the walls and remains on the ground the military was even less reasonable than the doctor. No samples of his reserach were found. The military must have removed anything directly connected to the research. The only remaining intact object we found was a six-armed plushy. Our scientists say it was made from organic matter on a keratin basis. Whatever that implies...  | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.3.a` | Head for the signal. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_frontier_sector_3_modifier` | $specialist_mem_frontier_sector$ Bonuses Tier III | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_skies_site.1.desc` | The planet is covered with widespread battlefields and flattened ruins that must have once been sprawling cities - now no more than metal boneyards.  Judging by the vehicles left rusting on the ground, which our scientists attribute to two distinct factions based on recuring markings, the inhabitants of this world fought among themselves. The signs of conventional warfare found in many places, however, cannot hide the real reason for this civilization's demise.  Despite the time that has passed since then, many areas - especially the ruins of bigger cities - feature radiation levels far past the point of being lethal to unprotected personnel. It can be assumed, that the entire planet surface was a radiation death zone at the fall of this civilization. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_fiery_thing` | Heat-Thing | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.15.desc` | After three days of futile attempts to restore atleast basic functionality, we had to evacuate to §Y[mem_aevum_primitive_rewind_world.GetName]'s§! surface. We suffered casualties, Jeff and Qualtrek. Please let their families know that both died saving the rest of us and in service to their empire.  §LCrashing of falling debris can be heard.§!  We require urgent evacuation. Our situation is dire. I repeat, evacuation is our only option.  - Aevum T. Dohrnii - Captain and leading scientist of Observation Station 37  | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `d_mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir_asteroid_crater_desc` | This reminder of a large scale impact event marks the surrounding landscape. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.335.desc` | $mem_aevum_anomaly_category_placeholder$ Sadly the equipment is like an enigma to us. The theory itself seems solid enough to develop new weaponry. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `Caradhras` | Caradhras | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.210.a` | A new Custom? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `tr_mem_vazurans_2_modifier_desc` | Unlocks Building: ['building:building_mem_vazuran_worker_exploiter'] | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.1.f` | Are you related to the shroud? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.14.a` | Fascinating | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_lost_forge_apply_knowledge` | Ancient Wisdom | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `preset_specialist_mem_frontier_sector_flavor_desc` | $preset_specialist_mem_frontier_sector_desc$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_leader_trait_legendary_timeskipper_desc` | His mind scrambled over eons, his body aged and de-aged countless times. §Y$NAME_mem_aevum_time_lord$§! has had enough time to regret, forget and repeat. His time is nothing more than waves repeatedly crashing on the shores of his fate. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `councilor_mem_subterranean_megacorp_female` | $councilor_mem_subterranean$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `zone_mem_ancestors_grudge_factory2_desc` | $zone_mem_ancestors_grudge_factory_desc$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.16.desc` | At last, I got this thing to work again. If only for one last message. Confirming: This will be my last recording. After our evacuation from the observation station, our escape pods passed several anomalies. One crew member de-aged into non-existence, another aged rapidly, succumbing to age within mere moments.  Only three of us made it the surface. Most of our rations were spoiled. Our only option was to continue to the nearest primitive city and look for food and shelter. To hell with the prime directive! I could not let my crew die like this.  §LA small sigh escapes him in the recording.§!  We managed to enter a city. Not as aliens were we met, but as messiahs. They believed us to be messengers of god. Somehow our appearances were already carved on several walls.  In the following year, Shlay and Dirko died. Shlay had contracted a fatal infection. Dirko was mauled to death by a group of heretics after abusing his new role. What shameful deaths... I, however, remain. For what purpose? Who knows...  §LA long pause...§!  To whoever finds this message, tell our kin to expect us dead.  - Aevum T. Dohrnii - Only survivor of Observation Station 37  | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.19.c` | [mem_aevum_future_leader.GetName] is already in active service. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_holo_projector` | Hologenerator Unit | `example/MEM-russian\mem_specimens_l_russian.yml` |
| `mod_job_mem_ancestors_grudge_relicsmith_drone_add` | $job_mem_ancestors_grudge_relicsmith_drone$ Jobs | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `MEM_VAZUR_INSULT_PROPOSE_2` | If ignorance were power, you might actually matter. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `r_mem_dark_heart_desc` | It was found in the depths of a world that exists at the border of our reality where the veil separating it from the shroud is at its thinnest. The sphere pulsates with energy sparkly over its smooth black surface. The stronger the emitted energy becomes, the darker the sphere itself appears... | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_vazurans_forge_planet_desc` | The foundation for a specialzied planet. This planet hosts massive foundries producing military grade alloys. Additional supporting infrastructure keeps the furnaces burning. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mod_planet_engineers_unity_produces_add` | $unity_with_icon$ per $pop_group_unit$ $job_engineer_plural_with_icon$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_catalytic_desc` | $job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_desc$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.26.desc_hive` | After many cycles of tireless work, this world has finally been restored. A whole world dedicated to fulfill our longing. The entire hive trembled in unison as the ancient machinery came online, anticipating the treasures to be. Just as the engines started, alarms pulled our attention towards a giant signal on our sensors closing in on [target.GetName].  We are receiving a transmission. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `situation_mem_ancestors_grudge_forge_repairs_deficit_minor_artifacts` | £minor_artifacts£ §Y$minor_artifacts$§! Deficit | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.10.desc` | The pillars of [mem_ancestors_grudge_planet.GetName] still stand, though battered and blackened by fire. Their runes are faded, but their frame holds strong, a testament to the craft of our ancestors.  A glimmer of hope spreads through our ranks as the Relic-Forge itself appears structurally intact. Though buried beneath rubble, it hums faintly, as though awaiting [Root.owner_main_species.GetAdj] hands to wake it from its slumber. If it can be rekindled, it may serve as the hearthstone for the hold's restoration. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_button7_title` | §PArchitectural Interval-Shortener§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.380.name` | What remains? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives.100.c` | Who built this station? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.106.desc` | With this character's death, the thread of prophecy is severed. Restore a saved game to restore the weave of fate, or persist in the doomed world you have created. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.105.b` | Restore it! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `lmao` | lmao? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |

| `MESSAGE_WE_LEVEL_UP_specialist_mem_frontier_sector_TITLE` | Outer Holds $MESSAGE_WE_LEVEL_UP_TITLE$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_vazuran_fallen_empires_situation_type` | s | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.16.desc_02` | Have you considered my offer? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `MESSAGE_SUBJECT_LEVEL_UP_specialist_mem_frontier_sector_TITLE` | Outer Holds Specialist Subject Leveled Up | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `tech_mem_ancestors_grudge_robot_traits_desc` | The final piece of lost knowledge our makers once held. Now the time to remake ourselves has come. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ue_battleship_cap` | $mem_ue_battleship$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ship_size_cap_l_russian.yml` |
| `d_mem_ancestors_grudge_boulder_park_hive` | Great Hoard | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.465.desc` | Our rune artificers felt a great disturbance and are suddenly in the mood for experiments. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `Anvilas` | Anvilas | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_pebbles_site.5.desc` | Upon reaching the underwater surface near the "hot spots" our drones began taking sediment samples as well as conducting exploratory drillings. It came as a shock, when all drillings came to a halt approximately at the same depth. After several dozen meters of dirt and debris the drills all hit a solid layer, stronger than any material we are able to manifacture, let alone anything existing naturally.  Upon further exploration and various deep survey scans our data suggests this surface to stretch around the entire globe, forming a base layer on which the upper layer - earth, rock, mountains and oceans all the same - rests. To assume its origin being the result of natural processes is out of the question. The technology necessary to create such a construction easily surpasses our own, which obviously rules out the natives as its creators.  There is only one place which may offer any further avenue of exploration. The source of the super geysir itself. A specially outfitted drone will be required in order withstand the forces at work down there. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.116.b` | No. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_magnus_abandoned_crystal_processing_hub` | Abandoned Crystal Processing Hub | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.10.e` | Is your food spoiled or why do you play these games? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `tech_mem_ancestors_grudge_robot_factory_desc` | The hidden knowledge of pre-industrial revolution mechanical servants. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_vazurans.1210.a` | At least the raids stopped. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives.100.desc.d` | It is the ruling body of the Orilan Commonwealth, one of the four most influencial nations within and a founding member of the galactic senate. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_vazurans.1205.a` | It is over. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_astral_tales.6.desc_03` | §HRealizing the possible implications, he shakes his head in a fit of embarrassment.§!  Not at all, I can assure you of that. It's just that, when you've had the same conversation a thousand times over and already know all the possible outcomes, you'll try to spice it up by improvising here and there. It appears my words were chosen poorly though. Have my apologies. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_astral_tales_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_pyro` | $mem_ancestors_grudge_pyro$$job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `leader_trait_mem_metal_demon_bound_desc` | Chains to bind the being and make it dependent to our whims. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_ceaseless.2.desc` | A rare sight to behold. $NAME_mem_mirror_hall_system$ is a giant wormhole breaching our dimension and forming connections to locations all over the known galaxy. Only this system seems to be affected by the strong gravitional pull of the wormhole. It is the center of the §Y$mem_ceaseless_base$§! network and whoever controls this entrypoint controls the network. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_metal_demon.35.a.tt` | §LEndless waves of fluid metal pour upon the lands swallowing everything.§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_leader_noenemies_or_rivals` | £trigger_no£ §YWe do not have any foes to curse§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.485.b_tt` | The predicted minimum outcome will be increased by one quality tier. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `d_mem_ancestors_grudge_boulder_hive_desc` | Enormous beams of metal twisted and teared into a gigantic mess. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `concept_mem_ancestors_grudge_hoarding_dragon` | Unforeseen Consequences | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.18.desc` | Requirements are fleeting echoes. Desires are elusive shadows. Our fates intertwine once more. Why, dwellers of this era, do our paths meet so soon again? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_stage2` | More Waiting | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
