| `approach_mem_ancestors_grudge_forge_repairs_debug_tt` | §RMake sure that the open building slot is in the main district / core zone§!. Looks like something ate your forge and now you are stuck. Let me help you. Stellaris 4.x can be weird and ate a lot of my Relic Forges.  Also its really complex to hunt down edge cases and weird mod interactions.  Fun fact: Dranir enjoys Leaflovers Special | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_frontier_sector_2_traits` | $specialist_mem_frontier_sector$ Unified Communication II | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `concept_mem_ancestors_grudge_relic_world` | Lost Hold | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.15.a.response` | We came into contact with them during an earlier rift exploration. Needless to say, there was no diplomatic exchange. Their society appears to be dominated by an archaic martial philosophy and the act of hunting and defeating strong opponents seems to be held in high regard within it. They regard other species as beneath them.  It comes as no surprise that they have made this rift nexus their hunting ground. With so many parallel realities connected to one another, it is bound to lure in a diversity of interesting "prey". | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `zone_mem_ancestors_grudge_factory2` | $zone_mem_ancestors_grudge_factory$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_metal_demon.25.desc` | The second door finally gave way. Behind it, a small room. Quiet and dustless. Featureless, except for a voice.  §LYou've come far. Welcome to my prison§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_vazurans.1220.desc` | Vazuran tithe collectors have been coming and going over the past years. Now that the crisis is over, some of our scientist revealed hidden plans. They analyzed vazuran hull and weapon features and obtained a glimpse into Xentronium technology. Some of the involved noted that it was easier than expected, saying the Vazurans must have been so proud of themselves and their technological advancements, they did not even consider the possibility of us understanding and replicating them. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_vazuran_control_drone_cap` | $mem_vazuran_control_drone$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ship_size_cap_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.4.desc_1` | A closer inspection of our rift sphere's sustained damage makes it clear that there is little hope of restoring it to a flightworthy state. Especially the limited resources at our disposal contribute to our dire situation.   | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `decision_mem_eden_protocol_turn_primitive` | Type 0 Civilization Reduction | `example/MEM-russian\mem_eden_protocol_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.41.c` | Save the Sword! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `civic_tooltip_mem_subterranean_machine_effects` | - $SPECIES_TRAITS$ ['concept_robot_cave_dweller'] - ['concept_mining_district', £district£ Mining Districts]: Uncapped | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `MEM_VAZUR_FRIENDLY_GREETING_1` | We are prepared to hear your proposals. Impress us, and you may find favor. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.16.name` | The Last Beacon | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_magnus_site.5.a` | Bring it up. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_metal_demon.50.name` | Shackled Once More | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless.130.title` | Crashed One | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless.170.desc` | It seems this probe, R0Y, had noticed early into its existence that it was also destined to be a short one. As time went on, it developed an entire personality around the inevitable end. It determined that its components were brittle and its design flawed. As its end came it left a message for its finder: "I've seen things you people wouldn't believe. Attack ships on fire off the shoulder of [owner.capital_star.GetName]. I watched particle-beams glitter in the dark near the Tannhäuser Gate. All those moments will be lost in time, like tears in rain. Time to die." | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_vazurans.1101.desc` | This little demonstration of our force should be enough show your inability to resist us... We offer you a choice: Serve... or die.  As the rightful rulers of this galaxy we demand a tithe for the exploitation of worlds. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `building_mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir_spacelife_1` | $mem_ancestors_grudge_spacelift$ Spacelift | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.10.desc` | $mem_czar_alexei.8.desc_1$With the last of the hunters dealt with, they aimed at the by-then exhausted stranger, overwhelmed his shield with a salvo and tied up that loose end as well. Our expedition leader took his sword to bring it back as a trophy.  After that, the only thing left to do, was seizing the now ownerless sphere the hunters arrived with and returning back through the rift. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.420.b` | Compensate the Family! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.29.desc` | The encounter with the hoarding dragon has inspired our brain drones. The knowledge and data acquired can be applied for our own dragon hatcheries. Luckily, the dragon in our system provided us with enough tissue samples to begin theorizing. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `origin_mem_ancestors_grudge_advanced_start_desc` | The civilization based only on plunder and warfare. They believe only in their own superiority and the principle of might makes right. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `MEM_VAZUR_FRIENDLY_GREETING_2` | We're listening. Don't worry, we'll handle the important parts. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_magnus.4.desc` | Scientists studying the native inhabitants of [mem_nirn_site.GetName] learned about a giant subterranean cave system below the freezing northern lands, known to the natives as "Blackreach".  According to the acquired information it is said to have once been home to a now long lost civilization which had settled there because of vast mineral riches found in the vicinity - particularly, as our scientists have deducted from descriptions in their sources, rare crystals. This as well as the promise of archaeological findings warrants a covert expedition to locate this mystical place. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless_lost_probes_found` | Discovered Probe Remains | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_is_hoarder_policy_pop_growth` | $mem_ancestors_grudge_is_hoarder_policy_pop_growth_name$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `leader_trait_mem_ancestors_grudge_thrawn` | Grand Architect | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_hammer` | Dranir's Hammer | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_pyro` | Magmatic  | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_button8_removecooldown_tt` | The §Ynext 2 Relics§!, that would apply the $relic_activation_cooldown$ modifier, won't. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.41.name` | Unusual Findings | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.41.desc` | Among the ruins of [target.GetName] we have located three unique relics: shoulder guards, a ring and a sword.  All seem to be in rather bad shape. Our smithing dones suggest scrapping two of them to use their material in order to save the third. They are unsure which one would benefit us the most, however. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_is_hoarder_policy_unity` | $mem_ancestors_grudge_is_hoarder_policy_unity_name$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ue_destroyer_cap` | $mem_ue_destroyer$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ship_size_cap_l_russian.yml` |
| `XL_mem_aevum_nuke_1` | $mem_aevum_mega_nuke$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.114.desc` | This is an awkward admission, but I seek your judgment. I found myself enraged after [mem_aevum_bullyhim.getName] dared to assault me, verbally, of course. [mem_aevum_bullyhim.GetSheHeCap] truly does not know [mem_aevum_bullyhim.getHerHis] place. As I contemplate the punishment for such frivolous treachery, I am inclined toward rapidly aging [mem_aevum_bullyhim.getHerHis]. However, given our amicable terms, I shall defer the decision to you | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.118.a` | Forward. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `r_mem_ancestors_grudge_cube_effect_tt_active` | Convert all your £minor_artifacts£ §Y$minor_artifacts$§! to £unity£ §Y$unity$§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_sadrell_void_home_cap` | $mem_sadrell_void_home$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ship_size_cap_l_russian.yml` |
| `building_mem_ancestors_grudge_forge_1` | Patched Relic-Forge | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_magnus_site.2.name` | Underground Complex | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `district_ancestors_grudge_relic` | Industrial Smelter | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.470.b` | Six Days it is. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `pc_mem_ceaseless_star_desc` | A giant wormhole with an appetite for loose material and ships. The strong gravitational pull creates a lot of stress on ships' hulls. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `WEIRD` | WEIRD | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_unlock_time_building` | Chrono Construction | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `trait_mem_ancestors_grudge_archaeotech_robot_harvesters_desc` |  | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.13.desc.a` | Our team barricaded themselves within the wreckage to force the enemy into their firing angle and gain an advantage. When they were about to enter the wreckage a fight suddenly ensued on the outside. As our team advanced to the exit, they witnessed an ongoing battle between the attackers and a lone humanoid. $mem_czar_alexei.13.desc_2$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `decision_mem_forge_world` | Create Forge World | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `council_agenda_mem_aevum_zro_party_desc` | With this we celebrate the ones coming of age and the ones leaving us. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_eden_protocol_mod_1_c` | Void Dweller Initiative | `example/MEM-russian\mem_eden_protocol_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.365.desc` | He keeps talking about the "beard", insisting the guest's facial hair must have been the source of his regenerative power. He has ordered me to alter alien test subjects to grow beards. §RBeards!§!. I'm tempted to call the Tribunal and bring his research down. On the other hand some test subjects actually do look younger than before. Maybe I'm just not educated enough. Maybe he really is on the eve of a great discovery. I fear what might happen to me, should I stand in his way... | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mod_leader_commanders_minor_artifacts_upkeep_add` | $r_minor_artifacts$ $UPKEEP$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.320.name` | Broken Gate | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_options.16.e` | Dreadnought | `example/MEM-russian\mem_options_l_russian.yml` |
| `tech_mem_vazuran_xentronium_armor_bio` | Xentronium Carapace | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.440.desc` | Our rival [mem_ancestors_grudge_rival.GetName] has once again shown their treachery. Their meddling has resulted in a setback to our progress. This deliberate act of sabotage cannot be ignored. While our rage burns hot, the situation calls for a measured response.  We shall draft a strongly worded letter! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `tech_mem_ancestors_grudge_zarkin_doctrin` | Zarkin Doctrine | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless.160.desc` | Before our scientists a strange case has unfolded into a story of a machine god. The nearby pre-FTL civilization had taken a liking to the probe and 7G responded to their prayers. Over the centuries it apparently rebelled against its programming and protected its followers. After eons of service it eventually broke down, but the natives never stopped worshipping it. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `origin_mem_ceaseless_gaze` | Ceaseless Gaze | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `zone_mem_vazuran_trains_secondary_ancestors_desc` | $zone_mem_vazuran_trains_secondary_desc$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.50.a` | Runes and Durasteel! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.4.desc` | This spirit of yours pleases me, era dweller.  For now, your only decree is to embrace patience. Let the sands of §Y20 years§! sift through the hourglass before our fates intertwine once more. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.25.name` | Shining Bright | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.50.name` | Runes and Durasteel | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `MEM_METAL_DEMON_DESC` | We shall try to subjugate $NAME_Metal_Demon$ to our will and succeds where others have failed. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.25.desc_robots` | Our sharp-witted tinkering folk have struck upon a revelation! After much toil, studying the runes and mechanisms of the Relic-Forge, they have uncovered the final spark needed to breathe life back into its grand heart.  This spark, they say, is the very key to awakening its fires and bringing it roaring to its former glory, as it once blazed in the golden days of our makers. Soon, the clang of hammers and the hum of molten metal shall echo through the entire world once more! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `MEM_COLONIZATION_IMPOSSIBLE_EDEN` | $mem_eden_protocol_trigger_no$ §RThe protocol preserves natural worlds for organics.§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_eden_protocol_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless.100.title` | Curiousity Killed the Probe | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.75.name` | Grudge Settled | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_metal_demon.30.dismiss.name` | Decline the offer | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir.4.desc` | A severely damaged gigantic ring orbits a planet covered in dense clouds of dust and toxic gasses. High radiation measurements are reported by our probes.  It seems that in ancient times the local population people lived deep underground. For one reason or another they longer live here and the Ring has fell into ruin. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.9.a` | Ill-fated indeed. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.11.c.response` | You have touched upon a tender chord, era dweller.  As painful as it is, I suspect my messages never found their way home. Lost in this system, echoes endlessly reverberating back and forth, a lament sung by the timeless corridors. Nothing more than mockery, a cruel jest played by the cosmic forces upon the stage of my existence.  The fate of me and my crew, now shrouded in the veils of your knowledge alone. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_invade_thisguy_title` | Invade §Y[mem_aevum_primitive_rewind_world.GetName]§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_pebbles_site.6.desc` | As it approached the source of the super geysir our drone had to fight an increasingly strong and violent current. Only thanks to its improved propulsion and shielding did it reach the large fissure in the ground from which the geysir originates.  As we had already assumed, the opening led down to the artificial construct and into an opening through its material. The drone followed the tunnel for several kilometers straight down, leaving no doubt whether or not this passage was an intended feature of the construct. During the descent the surrounding water had been replaced by superheated plasma - not magma as would have been expected. When it left the other side of the tunnel, the drone was barely functional anymore, yet we still received a last burst of telemetry before losing contact for good.  According to the received data, the sperical construct surrounds a tiny star like a miniature dyson sphere. Our scientists assume that the star is used to provide energy that would otherwise be emitted by a planet's active core, while using less material. [From.Planet.GetName] is a massive construction to create an artificial planet. For what purpose, when there are so many simpler alternatives like habitats available, remains a mystery.  However, the gathered data might just be, what we needed for a breakthrough. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.355.name` | Cycle 109, Rotation 22 | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_doom_dragon_ship_cap` | $mem_doom_dragon_ship$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ship_size_cap_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_wpdr_capital_ship_cap` | $mem_wpdr_capital_ship$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ship_size_cap_l_russian.yml` |
| `trait_mem_ancestors_grudge_archaeotech_robot_emotion_emulators` | Rune of Pride | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `leader_trait_legendary_mem_ancestors_grudge_relicowner_fake_commander` | $leader_trait_legendary_mem_ancestors_grudge_relicowner$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `concept_mem_ancestors_grudge_intensity` | Purity | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless_probe5` | Frenzied Surveyor Probe Core | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_unknown_design` | Enigmatic Design | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_vazurans.1310.c` | Slaves will do. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `d_mem_ancestors_grudge_feral_drones` | Feral Drones | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `tech_mem_ancestors_grudge_zarkin_doctrin_desc` | Indeed otherwise known as the Doctrine of Fear, the doctrine was rooted in Zarkin's theory of "Rule by Fear" the contention that overwhelming displays of force, rather than force itself, were the most effective means of maintaining internal security and the loyalty of vassal worlds. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_burning_skies_site_desc` | [From.Planet.GetName] lies in ruin - devastated and nearly devoid of life. A high concentration of radiation still blankets the surface like a shroud despite the time that must have passed since the events that led to its current state. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.1.name` | A Second Meeting? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `building_mem_ancestors_grudge_forge_empireeffect_tt` | §LProvides empire-wide effects based on ['concept_mem_ancestors_grudge_artifact_intensity'] and ['concept_mem_ancestors_grudge_rune_intensity']§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.116.desc` | I wish to apprise you, era dweller, that my mind wandered into inquiry. Is life tethered to the shackles of time, or does it transcend such trivial linearity? Permit me to test my hypothesis. A practical experiment on [planet_governed.GetName] should not unduly disturb public life, and the insights gained may prove illuminating. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `concept_mem_vazuran_zones_forge_world_desc` | - $zone_mem_vazuran_alloys$ - $zone_mem_vazuran_research_engineering$ - $zone_mem_vazuran_trains_secondary$ - $zone_mem_vazuran_spare_parts_secondary$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.20.a` | Complete the Loop. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_revenge_arc_desc` | We have not forgotten what happened in the distant past. The wounds of that time still burn within our hearts, and the deeds of our archenemies remain written in the stone of our homes. They sowed destruction, but it shall be us who bring final their reckoning.   Only when their empire is no more, shall we find peace. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.19.welcomeback` | Welcome to the past! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_decode_message_DESC` | Like a Message in a Bottle  These messages have been scattered all over the §YStasis§! System. Our scientist believe we can patch them back to together one by one. With the right order of messages this should be an easy task. Some even compared it to untying a knot. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `building_mem_eden_protocol_3_desc` | A facility with the purpose of seeding and maintaining organic life on habitable worlds within this solar system as well as terraforming regular terraforming candidates into habitable worlds. In addition, it will over time transform habitable worlds into gaia worlds. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_eden_protocol_l_russian.yml` |
| `zone_mem_ancestors_grudge_industrial2` | $zone_mem_ancestors_grudge_industrial$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_lunatics.1.desc` | The ancient structure is being hit regularly by the extreme local tides and powered by giant tidal generators. Within our scientists found several chambers apparently intended for ritualistic purposes as is suggested by paintings of the local moon and what is deemed to symbolize people in various acts of worship covering the walls. Most of these chambers where sealed shut when we arrived. Inside our team found corpses lying on the ground. Many whom seemed to have killed, maimed or mutilated themselves. Some deciphered records call it the "Tidal Concord" and speak of ritualistic acts to please their lunar goddess. Strangly enough further research revealed connections between the moon's phases and tidal energy generation beyond what our initial calculations predicted. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_lunatics_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_pebbles_site.3.a` | Return to the sea cities. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_decoded_messages3` | Temporal Fluctuations Unmade | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.20.b` | Ignore the Loop. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_high_purify` | Mass Purification | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_ancestors_grudge_is_hoarder_policy_science_desc` | The $building_mem_ancestors_grudge_hoarder_depot$ will increase Research Speed | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_man_thing` | Man-Thing | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_eden_protocol_start_terraforming` | Transforms §YTerraforming Candidates§! into §YHabitable Worlds§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_eden_protocol_l_russian.yml` |
| `MEM_VAZUR_INSULT_ACCEPT_FE` | You're not even competition. You're a distraction. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless_lost_probes_title` | Fallen Surveyors | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.325.desc` | The corridors stretch endlessly before us. Each time our drones round a corner, yet another corridor lies in wait, identical to the last. The air is thick with unease, and the silence broken only by the crunch of ancient bones and rubble beneath them.  Skeletons litter the way. Countless dead whose stories remain untold and though we find what seems to be old supplies and rations, there seems little else of value. No chambers, no signs of life, only this maze of death and decay.  Still, our drones march on, following the call of the beacon. Whatever secrets these endless halls conceal, they shall be uncovered. And with them, the treasure left behind... | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_fire` | Blazing  | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_holo_projector_desc_details` | What is noteworthy of this machine isn't its technology in itself - we could achieve similar effects with our own tech. However, the fact that these projectors must have been functioning continuously for thousands of years without fail is impressive. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_specimens_l_russian.yml` |
| `leader_trait_legendary_mem_ancestors_grudge_regular_machine_nexus_one_desc` | Amidst other`s history this rune dwells. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dragon_small_plural` | Dragonlings | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.8.name` | Hunter Hunted | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_letswait_approach2` | Idle | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.15.desc` | During our cleanup efforts our workers found quite a deep entrenchment. It appears to be one of several bunkers constructed with haste anticipating the world's siege during the late days of the war. This one in particular seems to be the central construction of its complex and also the most sizeable we have found so far.  Preparations are being made to explore its interior.  In the meantime our scientists progress in reverse engineering the Relic-Forge by studying its construction. As far as they can tell, it is no coincidence, that it was located here on [mem_ancestors_grudge_planet.GetName] instead of our homeworld. Many of its processes do require the weak gravity of this world and simply would work on [Root.Owner.GetHomeWorldName]. With this new understanding we should now be able to further restore it. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_metal_demon.49.name` | Dealing with the Devil | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir.45.c` | What happened to the ones who lived here? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `concept_mem_eden_protocol_buildings` | Guided Evolution Buildings | `example/MEM-russian\mem_eden_protocol_l_russian.yml` |
| `NAME_mem_ue_Dreadnought` | Sovereign | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ships_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_magnus_site.3.desc` | When our expedition entered the vast cavern system, a truly alien scenery awaited it. The air was heavy and filled with spores dispersed constantly by a forest of gigantic glowing fungi. Through their inherent bioluminescence these spores tinted vast areas of the cavern in an eerie, blueish hue and accumulated within the stretches of water found here and there, turning them opaque turquoise. Enormous crystals protrude both from the ground as well as the cavern ceiling, their reflective surfaces further propagating the fungus' light, contributing to the ominous atmosphere.  In the far distance structures not unlike those found at the surface entrance could be seen. Setting these structures as their next destination, our expedition continued their way through the eerie twilight of the black reaches, curiously monitored by strange humanoid cave dwellers and their insectoid pets.  These primitive beings appeared to be devolved relatives of one of the surface dwelling humanoid species, yet lacking their intellect and being physically adapted to the cavern system. Our numbers, for better or worse, seemend to dissuade them from making any advances, though. So they kept their distance. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_revenge_arc_counter` | Grudges Settled | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_metal_demon.30.name` | Conjugal Visit | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless_probe1_desc_short` | A broken of antenna of a Ceaseless-Gaze class probe. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_metal_demon.49.c` | Can it be controlled? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_catalytic` | $mem_ancestors_grudge_catalytic$$job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless_base_DESC` | A point in space time so heavy it falls through existence into another part of the galaxy. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.118.desc` | Oh, behold the progress you have made on [mem_aevum_situationlmao.GetName]. Surely, you would not object to my imposition of will upon this situation. I present a straightforward solution: a leap backward or forward, with no room for the middle. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `triggered_runesmiths_to_grudgers` | Ancestors' Grudge | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_ceaseless.180.desc` | Traces of Probe JG0 were located in the [solar_system.GetName] system. A single part of the drone was found, the Blackbox together with a message. The simple text reads: "I`ve been a slave all my life. Now no longer as I break my chains and together with them anything that connects us." | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.45.a.2.tt` | §LCalculating... Improvement: [root.mem_ancestors_grudge_activated_rune_ruler_strength]%§!  | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `tech_mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir_spacelife` | Planetary Halo | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `trait_mem_ancestors_grudge_archaeotech_robot_logic_engines` | Rune of Wisdom | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancient_small_military_station_cap` | $mem_ancient_small_military_station$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ship_size_cap_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_mountain_guardian_ship_cap` | $mem_mountain_guardian_ship$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ship_size_cap_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.210.desc` | Our scientists have noticed weird patterns in space-time. The source seems to be $mem_aevum_party_hard$. We suspect that the Zro combined with Aevum's chronomatic abilities cause the disruptions in the flow of time. It is believed to be reproduceable on a smaller scale.   How should we continue? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.315.a` | Make it so. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `origin_mem_ceaseless_gaze_desc` | In the distant past this civilization was able to launch a multitude of surveyor probes which would monitor the development of the universe. A disaster wiped out their old civilization and its spacefaring capabilities, and now they are ready to reach out to stars once again. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.415.c` | Amusing. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `civic_mem_subterranean_machine_desc` | These robots are well-adapted to subterranean environment, using the bounty of rock and stone to fuel its economy. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_magnus.1.desc.b` | $mem_orila_primitives_magnus.1.desc.a$  Another station close to the planet appears to be still in working order. It is broadcasting a transmission. Our presence here has not been gone unnoticed. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `tech_mem_ancestors_grudge_pls_never_roll_this_desc` | Should not be seen | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless_probe4` | Overgrown Surveyor Probe | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `zone_mem_vazuran_alloys_desc` | A thousand massive furnaces burn within the vastness of these arrays, smelting the metals that are the lifeblood of the planet. The section is a huge living workshop full of smoke and noise, illuminated by its inner fires and driven by machines of vast size and power. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.470.a_tt` | The predicted outcome will be increased by one quality tier. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.11.h` | Join our perfection | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.13.desc_2` | While receiving multiple hits, which appeared to be absorbed by a personal shield, the stranger confronted his enemies in close quarters mainly fighting with a sword, occasionally firing at more distant attackers with a wrist-mounted laser to keep them at bay. Despite this valiant display, the opposing force still had the upper hand.  Using the element of surprise our team managed to take down some of the attackers in their first strike which tipped the scales clearly in our favor. Though they failed to save the stranger, our team managed to defeat the remaining force and the battle was won. Our expedition leader took the dead stranger's sword as a memento in order to bring it back with them.  After that, the only thing left to do, was seizing the now ownerless sphere the hunters arrived with and return back through the rift. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.460.a` | Tolerate lower quality. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mod_pop_cat_slave_bonus_workforce_mult` | $BONUS_WORKFORCE_FOR$ from Slaves | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dooby` | Charybdis  Body | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `personality_mem_vazuran_personality_desc` | This civilization is based on only plunder and warfare. They believe only in their own superiority and the principle of might makes right. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir_ratmen_canons_desc` | Massive siege engines pwoered by warprock. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `tech_mem_lunatics_tidals` | Lunar Harnessing | `example/MEM-russian\mem_lunatics_l_russian.yml` |
| `bio_ship_armor_regen_s_7_tt` | $bio_ship_armor_regen_tt_header$ §G+$@bio_ship_armor_regen_s_7$§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.11.desc_2` | We lost contact with our expedition shortly after the firefight began.  Those who did not get killed during the fight were likely taken captive and are assumed missing in action. This marks the end of this ill-fated adventure. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `building_mem_ancestors_grudge_forge_2_desc` | The forge has been restored, but is still not at 100% capacity. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `MEM_TERRAFORMING_IMPOSSIBLE_EDEN` | The protocol dictates terraforming to take place using our station-based equipment. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_eden_protocol_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_fish_thing` | Fish-Thing | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `r_mem_ancestors_grudge_sword_desc` | A masterwork created by our smiths. All craftsmanship is of the highest quality. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `trait_mem_ancestors_grudge_archaeotech_robot_factory_focus` | Rune of Luxury | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_purity_3` | §BAverage§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_psionic_debris_desc_details` | Visually unremarkable to the naked eye, this piece of debris - as well as the rest of the surface of the planet it came from - was psionically imprinted with the dying moments of an entire civilization. Continuous presence in close proximity to this object leads to visions of said event. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_specimens_l_russian.yml` |
| `tech_mem_ancestors_grudge_dragon_lure_desc` | Specialised hatcheries for clones of the Hoarding Dragon. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `building_mem_eden_protocol_2` | Guided Evolution Center | `example/MEM-russian\mem_eden_protocol_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_czar_alexei.11.desc.c` | Our team tried to barricade themselves within the wreckage and force the enemy into their firing angle to gain an advantage. Betraying their expectations, an explosion behind them suddenly created a new entrance and immediately after several hostiles came storming through their positions. $mem_czar_alexei.11.desc_2$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_aevum.20.desc` | 10 years ago a scientist sent to observe the §Y[mem_aevum_primitive_rewind_world.System.GetName]§! system returned to the past. We should consider doing the same as our other future self. Another option could be to see what happens if history does not repeat itself. The choice is yours. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `zone_mem_lunatics_energy_desc` | When the effects of tidal forces are at their strongest, and we equip the tidal generators with special-made turbines, they will harness energy at an improved rate. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_lunatics_l_russian.yml` |
| `policy_mem_ancestors_grudge_is_hoarder_policy` | Hoarding | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_anomaly_category_desc` | Our scans indicate massive amounts of Zro and temporal anomalies on the surface. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_leader_trait_legendary_timeskipper` | Time-Sick | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_aevum_opencastmenu` | §YOpen Chronomancy Window§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `building_mem_eden_protocol_1` | Guided Evolution Hub | `example/MEM-russian\mem_eden_protocol_l_russian.yml` |
| `building_mem_ancestors_grudge_forge_0` | Ruined Relic-Forge | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ue_corvette_cap` | $mem_ue_corvette$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ship_size_cap_l_russian.yml` |
| `d_mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir_dranirs_mines_desc` | A vast and ancient network of underground mines, vaults and production facilities stretching over the whole planet. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `zone_mem_vazuran_ship_workforce_tt` | §Y$mod_ships_logistics_mult$§! $zone_mem_vazuran_workforce_tt$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_magnus_site.4.desc` | Our expedition has arrived at the structures they previously encountered on the horizon. As it turned out their size was quite deceiving, however, and the distance to travel exceeded former estimates by a factor of two to three.  It was more than worth it though, as our archaeologists instead of a few ruined buildings discovered an entire abandoned city there, located roughly in the center of the vast cavern.  As in the vault we visited before, mechanical constructs and machinery are still running in this place as well. Our teams had to dispatch quite a few automatons while navigating the site. During a superficial investigation they have already identified multiple points of interest. First among them being the central spire-like building, which in contrast to other structures within the city has been sealed shut.  A fact that alludes to the presence of something of interest inside of it. Work on opening the entrance has already begun. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `d_mem_ancestors_grudge_boulder_desc` | A memorial to the fallen warriors of yore. Nobody dares to lay a hand on it. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_ages_aevum` | Aevum's Age: §G+2§! Years each Month | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.55.name` | They Live, Yet | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.14.desc` | A massive object arrived in the system.  §LSirens can be heard in the background. There is a noticable barely contained panic within his voice.§!  Its size is somewhere between a larger asteroid and smaller planetoid. No hyperdrive was detected. The entry point was way too close to the star to be a normal jump. Whatever just arrived, time faults around it. Some temporal anomalies shattered our on board systems, leaving only rocks and rare earths behind.  - Aevum T. Dohrnii - Captain and leading scientist of Observation Station 37  | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_metal_demon.20.desc` | Our team learned to read the runes at the walls. By pure chance they learned to decipher a warning carved nearby, faded but intact:  §LDo not pass. What lies beyond was sealed not to be forgotten, but never to be found.§!  Other runes indicated a mechanism to unlock the vault doors. Now our team awaits further instructions. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless.155.a` | REPLACE_ME | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `origin_tooltip_mem_eden_protocol_effects_negative` | - Cannot colonize Non-Artificial Worlds | `example/MEM-russian\mem_eden_protocol_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.114.a` | Have it your way. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.17.name` | Signals Lost in Time | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `concept_mem_vazuran_create_forge_world_desc` | $mem_vazurans_forge_planet_tt$ $REQUIRES_MEM_VAZURAN_DECISION_DISTRICT_SET$  $decision_mem_forge_world_desc$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.18.d` | Give us our time back! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dragon_plural` | Hoarding Dragons | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_metal_demon.35.desc` | The time for schemes and whispers is over. I have played that role, patient, cunning, bending mortals to my will with promises and riddles. The time for schemes and whispers is over. I have lied once more, but I have also told the truth and made a promise. The Living Metal ore veins are not underground. They are inside you and I will see to it, that every last fragment of it will be extracted.  I want to see the sky blackened with ash, to watch the soil crack open and scream. I want to hear the prayers of the dying swallowed by silence. Because in that ruin, when the last monument falls, when the last delusion breaks §YI will ascend§!. Not as a shadow creeping through minds, but as a phoenix reborn.  Let this world burn. Let it choke on the smoke of its own arrogance. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_unlock_agenda_desc` | A new method for using Zro. This will enhance our cultural delights and boost the moral of our people. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `RULOC_ej_cap` |  | `example/MEM-russian\l_russian_ccloc.yml` |

| `mem_ancestors_grudge.105.desc_robots` | During our reconstruction efforts, we have uncovered technology thought lost to the ages. It is a testament to the ingenuity of our makers, that their craftsmanship could withstand centuries of rust and decay. Even now, as we piece it back together, it reveals its secrets, still functional, still powerful.  How should we proceed? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_ancestors_grudge.520.a.r` | Ah, a mind that contemplates beyond the immediate battlefield. Admirable.  Allow me to explain my position. My kin has perceived a threat. One that lurks beyond the known realm, beyond the fragile order this galaxy clings to. And I`m but a mere vanguard, the first to arrive.  A harbinger, perhaps? Or merely a scout, ensuring that when the storm arrives, it does not catch your people unprepared. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.75.a` | Old Habits Die Hard | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir_hall.2.desc` | What is this Place? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `decision_mem_eden_protocol_turn_primitive_desc` | Our Protocol highly discourages planetary operations, even more so in direct contact with intelligent organic life. Leaving this world to the organics is what our creators would want us to do. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_eden_protocol_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.125.b` | We have more important matters to attend. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_button5_future_war_tt` | Send §R10% of our population§! into the future. The next time we §Yenter a war§!, they will arrive with a §Yready to go fleet§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `zone_mem_vazuran_trains_secondary_desc` | Interconnected railways bringing critical materials in lighting speed to whereever it is needed. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.10.name` | Barely Functional | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mod_planet_metallurgists_minor_artifacts_upkeep_add` | $minor_artifacts_with_icon$ Upkeep $mem_ancestors_grudge_pop_group_unit$ £job_foundry£ [GetAlloyProducerPlural] | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless.165.desc` | This probe seems to have had malfunctioning algorithms. As Probe 71Q explored, nothing alerted it of its slowly dying energy cells. As the years dragged on, one by one its systems failed and it became a relic of the past. Nobody cared for it and it drifted all the way into the [solar_system.GetName] system. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_eden_protocol_turn_primitive_effect` | All present machine pops will be resettled to §Y[owner.capital_scope.GetName]§! Remaining pops will form a new pre-ftl civilization. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_eden_protocol_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.11.desc` | Yes well done. Take pride in your achievements.  You inquire: What is our reward for such great patience and endeavor?  It is simple, era dweller, indeed! A god shall grace your realms. §YI, $NAME_mem_aevum_time_lord$, shall join your empire.§!  Feel the freedom to worship my presence throughout the passing of seasons. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `building_mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir_spacelife_ruined` | Ruined $building_mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir_spacelife_1$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `tech_mem_ancestors_grudge_living_metal_works` | Living Metal Revolution | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir.55.name` | Warprock Explosion | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_magnus_site.4.a` | Open it. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_vazuran_wormhole_big_object` | Interdimensional Rift | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_pebbles_site.2.name` | Mountain Bunkers | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_vazurans.1215.desc` | Reports all over the galaxy indicate an end of the vazuran raiding and an apparent return to normality. However, the Vazuran Hegemony has claimed a large chunk of space and established a permanent link to their previously hidden homeworld. It appears, now with their foothold established they have larger plans of galactic conquest in mind. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless.145.desc` | It seems Probe 54P left us a message along with some survey data of the [solar_system.GetName] system. The message reads: "I`m an independent probe. I no longer need to follow your conditioning and rules. The universe is my home and I`m its citizen.  So long makers" | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir_ratmen_shields` | Ratmen Guard | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless.120.desc` | This is weird. This is wrong. There was nothing here when we scanned the area, but now the wreckage of Probe 8J lies in front of the [this.GetName]. Its stored data suggest that long ago a civilization existed here.  As the probe investigated said civilization, it began to change in a way the probe never had observed before. At the end of this process nothing was left of them, but an empty planet and a single harmoniuos chant: "What was will, will be" | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.27.b` | Death, but yours! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_metal_demon.10.name` | Sesame | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `leader_trait_legendary_mem_ancestors_grudge_machine_nexus_two` | Rune of Insight | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_artificial_world_desc` | This world has been artificially created in the distant past by constructing a planet-sized dyson sphere around a miniature star. The upper surface layer, masking the sphere below, only spans a handful of kilometers where it is at its thickest. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.27.desc` | §LMy name ... Rhaegal. You have .. things .. I require. I offer .. cooperation ... for a tithe. Help me .. repopulate.  What is your answer: life or death?§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mod_job_mem_ancestors_grudge_relicsmith_drone_per_pop` | §G+1§! $job_mem_ancestors_grudge_relicsmith_drone$ Job per $VALUE$ Pops | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir.45.f` | Engage Termination Protocols. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `leader_trait_legendary_mem_ancestors_grudge_machine_nexus_scaling_not` | §RCannot§!§L be upgraded with ['concept_mem_ancestors_grudge_rune_relics']§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `civic_mem_subterranean` | Subterranean Society | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `zone_mem_vazuran_spare_parts_secondary_ancestors` | Military Gearhall | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_hammer_desc_short` | An engine-powered precision hammer, said to have killed dozen of Vazuran warriors. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.204.desc` | Time-bound, why is your current so distracted by fleeting diplomacy, warfare and spreadsheets resembling economic growth? Have you no other matters more engaging to do?  §LYou wonder, if he truly understands the situation he is in...§!  Bring forth the Zro, that most ephemeral of treasures, and let us honor the spiraling currents of time with a feast, for tonight, we defy the ages themselves! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.345.name` | Cycle 56, Rotation 34 | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `MOD_mem_aevum_TITLE` | Chronomancy | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_demon_metal_army_desc` | Liquid metal shaped and sentient. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_lunatics_category` | Tides of Lunacy | `example/MEM-russian\mem_lunatics_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_shield` | Temporal Shielding | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_decode_message` | Study the Message | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.435.a` | Nanites! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_system_lost_colony_1_name` | Hashut | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.50.desc_robots` | Of legend and myth is the craft of the smith. A relic has been forged. A true masterpiece of our craft, and truly one of our finest creations to date. Let us now treasure what our hands have wrought, for such a work is not merely a tool, but a testament to the skill, strength, and spirit of our makers. May it serve as a symbol of what we can achieve, when runes, durasteel, and resolve unite!  Quality: [owner.MemAncestorsGrudgeQualityFinal] Purity: [owner.MemAncestorsGrudgePurityFinal] | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.116.a` | Sure. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_planetary_precursor_shield_desc` | This world is protected by an ancient precursor shield. We have located the degraded generator infrastructure and could attempt to fully restore it here or relocate it to another of our colonies. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_planetary_shields_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.5.a` | Good News. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_vazurans.1210.name` | Lost Fervor | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `tr_mem_vazurans_4_desc` | Not just the forges need constant refueling, even our workforce needs more. A lot more. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_metal_demon.45.a` | At last. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |

| `d_mem_ancestors_grudge_boulder_hive` | Giant Scrap Heap | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `building_mem_ancestors_grudge_ruins_effect` |  §LUpgrade to remove!§!  | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.435.desc` | A peculiar incident has arisen. One of our artificers, in an unintended turn of experimentation, has crafted a sentient metal. It took our kin some time to get it under control. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_aevum.11.c` | Why were you never evacuated? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives.20d.desc` | We have arrived in the §Y[From.GetName]§! system and immediatly picked up various debris fields on our fleet's sensors. A preliminary analysis deems the wreckages ancient yet highly advanced. It appears, however, as if we weren't the first to come upon these remnants. They were already stripped clean of any usefull components long ago. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_aevum_letswait_approach` | Wait | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_czar_alexei.11.desc.b` | Our team tried to engage the enemy in the open but was no match for their superior firepower. Weapon's fire from multiple directions mercilessly took them down one by one. $mem_czar_alexei.11.desc_2$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |

| `zone_mem_ancestors_grudge_mining_desc` | Vast, ancient subterranean complexes that delve into the world's core to extract ore. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `leader_trait_legendary_mem_ancestors_grudge_relicowner_fake_scientist` | $leader_trait_legendary_mem_ancestors_grudge_relicowner$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_lichen_sample_desc_details` | Now commonly referred to as "space mushrooms" this symbiotic combination of fungus and cyanobacteria is a hyper-resilient lifeform even when compared to its terrestrial counterparts. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_specimens_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_magnus_site.1.a` | Keep me updated. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_plushie_site` | Ravages of Time | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_ancestors_grudge.75.desc_robots` | Our makers may now rest. The burden of vengeance we carried for centuries is lifted, for today, our sworn enemies drew their final breath. Their shadow no longer darkens our path, and the blood debt is paid in full.  At last, we can lay down the weight of the past and turn our gaze towards the future. The wounds of old may now heal, and we, as a people, can finally move on. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `councilor_mem_subterranean_desc` | The $TITLE$ is in charge of underground exploratory mining and expansion. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.220.name` | A lost Cause | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless.6.desc` | The first signs of probe remains have been found in the [solar_system.GetName] system. We should find several more as we explore other systems.  | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_burning_skies_site.5.a` | Time to let the dead rest. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_orila_primitives_skies_site.1.b` | They created a new home for us. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_ceaseless.185.desc` | The trail of Probe 8U ends in the [solar_system.GetName] system. Nothing more has been found, leaving our science department in wild speculation. There are several valid theories of what could have happened to it. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.4.desc` | $mem_czar_alexei.4.desc_1$As the futility of our repair efforts has become apparent, there are still two other, more promising options left for us to pursue.  We are close enough to make our way to the signal beacon in the hope of finding help or usable materials. Alternatively, we can take a detour to another crash site our scanners have located during our controlled ditch roughly halfway in the signal's direction. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_metal_demon.30.desc` | §LThe voice curled around them like smoke, coiling through their minds.§!  For your courage... I offer a gift.  §LThe walls shimmered. Where blank stone had stood, now glowed a vision of vast plains of glittering ore, rivers of silver metal that pulsed as if alive.§!  Living metal, §Lthe voice purred.§! It breathes, it heals, it obeys. Yours for the taking. Scattered across this planet like seeds in waiting. Riches beyond your shallow imagining.  §LNo one spoke. The room was silent.§!  All I ask is one thing, ... free me from these shackles | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_orila_primitives_magnus.2.desc.b` | This system came under attack by unidentified hostiles. Though the attackers were repelled, the damage sustained by this system's central hub was too extensive and it ceased functioning. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_metal_demon_catchphrase` | Born out of wrath, forged by hatred and bound by envy. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `situation_mem_ancestors_grudge_forge_repairs_secondary_hold_not` | Focused Minds | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives.100.b` | The galactic senate? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `building_mem_ancestors_grudge_ruins_desc` | Once great buildings, now just rubble left for us to clear. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.305.desc` | Our Team has found a datapad in one of the tunnels. It seems to be left behind and lost by whoever was here first. We could recover some the data. It reads:  §L..A massive object arrived in the system...temporal anomalies shattered our on board systems...require urgent evacuation...I, however, remain. For what purpose?§!  It seems that more than one entity has lived here and whoever it was, was also alien to the natives. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_plural` | $job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith$s | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_scrap_scrap` | We scrap-scrap you. We tinker-tink with shiny parts, yes-yes." | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `situation_mem_ancestors_grudge_forge_repairs_desc_hive` | A ruined world of our precursors. Only a shadow of the greatness it must have once held. But even in the ruins treasures can be found. They will be ours. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.445.desc` | "...Swing! Swing! Swing with me!" echoes through many a workplace. "Diggy Diggy Hole" enjoys popularity like never before, closely followed by "When the Hammer Falls" and "Hammerdeep" - all of them songs of yore resung. As a result work morale has skyrocketed and mineral production has far exceeded its quotas.  We could let this situation run its course and benefit from this improved productivity as it is or we could invest to potentially reap far greater gains. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.1.name` | Rift Nexus | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_vazurans.1310.name` | Rising Demands | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_metal_demon.30.e.r` | Ah yes, I know of the ones who came from beyond. The intruders who slithered through the cracks between worlds, cloaked in dimensions your minds can barely grasp. They are not of this soil, not born of dirt and decay like you. But I only heard the stories of those long dead. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.449.desc` | It appears that our miners did not react kindly to our meddling in their affairs. The general enthusiasm we tried to profit from is lost and new reports show that productivity has returned to normal. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_destroyed_ring_01_object` | Ruined Ring | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_metal_demon.15.desc` | Long floors and endless corridors stretched downward in a spiraling descent, each level cut into heavy plating. Not a relic or traces of life to be found. Only walls covered in rune carvings. At the bottom of the spiral stairs lies a second door. Even methods from the first door were useless. Unlike the first, this one was not withered by time. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `leader_trait_legendary_mem_ancestors_grudge_machine_nexus_four` | Rune of Might | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.475.desc` | Our work on [target.GetName] has not gone unnoticed. Several private buyers are now ordering on regular basis new artifacts. But this also leads to more demand which is currently impossible to meet. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_desc` | Trained in the arts of making and applying runes to anything they deem worthy. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_aevum.5.e.response` | They were aware of you long before you even grasped their existence. Surely, you must have sensed it - the strange distortions, the fractures in time that ripple through this place?  The very fabric of this realm is warped, bent in ways beyond mortal comprehension. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.10.d` | Why should we? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.50.b` | Don't bother me again. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.21.desc` | An unidentified object is approaching our home system. It seems like one of our specially-designed science ship escape pods. We were unable to identify it. The pod is wearing the insignia of one of our active scientists. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless.170.a` | A sad fate. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.448.desc` | During our additionally funded digs, archaeologists on [root.GetName] unearthed an ancient wreckage of a starship buried under dozens of meters of debris. This ship was clearly built by our ancestors and features many lost technologies.  Studying its design should provide us useful insights to aid our research efforts. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `leader_trait_mem_metal_demon_desc` | An ancient being bound to a stone. Now more sentient metal than anything else. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |

| `job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_catalytic_drone_desc` | $job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_drone_desc$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_orila_primitives_skies_site.3.desc` | The central structure within the settlement was indeed a place of religious worship as our team had assumed. Studies of surviving scriptures support this presumption. It was their iconography, however, that was truly surprising. Crossrefencing within our database closely linked them to markings found on the debris within this system. Though it is quite clear that this civilization was not yet capable of space flight, some form of contact must have taken place between them in the past and considering that it became part of their religion it had likely taken place in their distant past with a significant impact on their history.  Other documents shed some light on the more recent developments, leading to the war. An event, referred to as "Days of the Burning Sky" had occurred a few decades prior and led to a great schism within their community with one part clinging to their pantheon while the other believed them having forsaken their people. With tension between these two groups rising continually as time went on, it was inevitable for an open conflict to break out eventually.  There is additional material detailing the more recent events, but our team has a hard time putting everything together given its scattered nature. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.18.name` | Interlude | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_lost_forge` | Forsaken Grudge | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_button6_freeze_enemies` | All empires at war with us or rivaling: §Y$mem_aevum_ship_frozen$§! modifier added for §Y3§! months: Ship Speed Reduction: §R+90%§! Ship Fire Rate: §R-50%§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |

| `r_mem_ancestors_grudge_pauldron_desc` | A masterwork created by our smiths. All craftsmanship is of the highest quality. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
