| `mem_ceaseless_probe2_desc_short` | A matrix core of a Ceaseless-Gaze class probe. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.70.a` | Regrettable | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.19.desc` | Sir, we found  §Y$NAME_mem_aevum_time_lord$§! in the §Y[mem_aevum_primitive_rewind_world.System.GetName]§! system. He seemed unaware of our presence. The mission was a complete success. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `situation_mem_ancestors_grudge_crafting_monthly_change_tooltip` | Progress | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_planetary_shields.15.desc` | Work on the degraded Precursor Shield Generator on [root.GetName] has been completed. We will now be able to reassemble it whereever we choose. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_planetary_shields_l_russian.yml` |
| `concept_mem_vazuran_menace` | $precursor_mem_vazurans$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_military_reports` | Defense Compendium | `example/MEM-russian\mem_specimens_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_beard` | Aevum's Everlasting Beard | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_frontier_sector_1_discovery` | $specialist_mem_frontier_sector$ Border Guards | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mod_planet_miners_minor_artifacts_produces_add` | $minor_artifacts_with_icon$ $mem_ancestors_grudge_pop_group_unit$ [miner.GetIcon] [GetMinerPlural] | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `NAME_mem_mirror_hall_system` | The Great Maw | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `situation_mem_ancestors_grudge_forge_repairs_monthly_change_tooltip` | Repair Works | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.11.a.response` | Oh, young one, cease the queries of what I can offer your realm.  Instead, ponder what offerings you shall present to a god. Your trials, a testament to worthiness, draw to a close. Embrace the culmination, bask in the power bestowed upon you. Why question that which transcends your young current?  §HHe pauses to think. After a moment of deep contemplation he continues.§!  Let me reveal the tapestry of my capabilities. Have you ever considered the weaponization of time, the art of delaying foes, hastening economic flow, or expediting the construction of grand structures? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.520.desc` | §HAs our soldiers celebrated their well-earned victory, the massive corpse of the Kraken burst into nothing more than humanoid-sized pieces. From below a vessel emerged, opening it`s channels:§!  Ah, how refreshing, a civilized face. Courtesy, even in times of conflict, is a rare trait.  I see your forces, their strengths and their weaknesses. More so flaws that are left uncorrected, will be your undoing. Allow me to refine them, to elevate them beyond their current state. In doing so, you shall aid me as well. A mutually beneficial arrangement, would you not agree? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `tech_mem_ancestors_grudge_dragon_lure` | Ancient Leviathan Incubation | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `councilor_mem_subterranean_female` | $councilor_mem_subterranean$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_catalytic` | $mem_ancestors_grudge_catalytic$$job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir_expedition_preparation` | Expedition Preparations | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_VAZURAN_CARAPACE_DESC` | This super dense material once provided Vazuran vessels with extreme durability. Injecting it into the carapaces of our bioships will make them superior to any other armor type known to us. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.455.desc` | Several of our Artifact Smiths have high expectations for their newest creations. It occured to them that not their skill but rather the underfunded workplace is the problem. They assured us that more funding would lead to better outcomes. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_anvil_site_desc` | One of many bunkers constructed with haste in anticipation of the coming siege during the closing days of the war. This is one of the largest we have found so far. There are signs of intense fighting around the entrance. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_system_DESC` | The $NAME_mem_ancestors_grudge_system$ System has a Neutran Star and several uninhabitable planets.  $system_initializer_DESC$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.3.name` | Crashlanding | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_eden_protocol_trigger_no` | £trigger_no£ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_eden_protocol_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_blessedworld` | Chrono Blessing | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancient_large_military_station_cap` | $mem_ancient_large_military_station$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ship_size_cap_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives.10.name` | REPLACE_ME | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_VAZURAN_AURA_DESC` | Charged fields to deter any projectile or beam which tries to hit the ship. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ttw_battlecruiser_01_cap` | $mem_ttw_battlecruiser_01$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ship_size_cap_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless.110.desc` | At first we had high hopes for this atleast outwardly nearly intact probe, but on closer inspection not much of value is left of Probe 91K.  Its database wiped clean, navigation logs erased and high value electronics removed. However not all was gone as someone left an inscription on the interior hull reading:  "We see you. Do not try this again"  Are we being watched? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless.135.a` | Regrettable. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.19.b.response` | To observe the entity known as §Y$NAME_mem_aevum_time_lord$§!.  | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.415.desc` | Today, one of our artificers approached us with a most curious enigma. In their efforts to craft relevant artifacts for the Trial, they have unexpectedly produced a rune-inscripted cube.  At first glance, it appears as an oddity. Yet the runes upon its surface pulse faintly. Though its purpose is unclear, it may very well qualify as an artifact, in its own right. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.5.desc_hive` | Our surveyor drones report the successful landing on [mem_ancestors_grudge_planet.GetName]. They have already begun to explore the surrounding ruins to determine our next steps. The location for our planetfall had not been chosen by chance, however, as we are heading for the strongest source of the calling. It is not as we had previously assumed one singular signal, that led us here. Instead we can now discern multiple signals of varying strength spread over this world's surface.  This place appears to have once been a vast industrial zone and the calling pulls us towards its heart... | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `r_mem_ancestors_grudge_anvil_desc` | A runed anvil steeped in legend and created out of a rare material extracted from a fallen vazuran ship by an ancient Master Artifact-Smith, possibly even Dranir himself. For centuries, it was believed to be lost for all eternity, its fate sealed with the fall of the old world. But as it turns out, the ancestors' wisdom and foresight was unsurpassed. They safeguarded the anvil, shielding it from destruction until the very end. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_lunatics.2.name` | Lunatics | `example/MEM-russian\mem_lunatics_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.310.name` | Amidst Zro | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.104.name` | Lost and Found | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_is_hoarder_policy_stability_desc` | The $building_mem_ancestors_grudge_hoarder_depot$ will increase Stability | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `concept_mem_vazuran_create_forge_world` | $decision_mem_forge_world$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `REQUIRES_MEM_OBTAINED_VAZURAN_TECH` | Defeated raiding §YVazuran Fleets or Armies§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_diggy_hole` | Diggy Diggy Hole! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.448.title` | Technological Treasure | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `zone_mem_vazuran_spare_parts_secondary_desc` | Small assembly lines for construction of spare parts used in our navy. The preassembled devices can be easily swapped during times of war. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.315.desc` | The lone warrior, who made his last stand in the great hall was the last Master Artifact-Smith, a disciple of the teachings of Dranir himself, the legendary artifact smith only known from ancient texts. Within the hall stands his famed runed anvil. His hammer lies beside him, a tool of his craft transformed to a weapon of violence in defense of his kin. By ancient tradition, such an act meant the smith swore an oath to never to forge again.  While his name may be lost to time, his deeds shall never be forgotten. In death, he held true to his oath, felling dozens of Vazurans before his own life was bygone. We shall fulfill his final rite as is fitting a hero. The Master Artifact-Smith shall be laid to rest, his oath carried into eternity. His hammer will be passed on to his successor, once a worthy smith ascends. The anvil will remain here, as a silent reminder of the past. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir_hall.1.desc` | Visit the legendary star §Y$mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir$'s Hall§!. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.370.name` | Cycle 169, Rotation 16 | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.15.e` | Back to your proposal to join us. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dragon_small` | Dragonling | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `building_mem_ancestors_grudge_ruins_1` | Cleared Ruins | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dragonling_undead` | Revived Dragonling | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `tr_mem_vazurans_3` | Xentronium Munition | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.4.name` | Repairs are Futile | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_frontier_sector_3_discovery` | $specialist_mem_frontier_sector$ Hyperspace Mapping | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_pebbles_site.1.name` | Lifeless Cities | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_situation_is_constructing` | Construction Works | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.20.desc_hive` | The work goes on, with the workers drones eagerly clearing away the rubble and ruin of the past.  More crucially, our brain drones studying the forge have struck upon grand discoveries! With what they have found, we are now set to bring the forge back to full productivity. We cannot wait for the treasures it will create. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_frontier_sector_3_penalties` | $specialist_mem_frontier_sector$ Penalties Tier III | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `MEM_ANCESTORS_GRUDGE_GOT_RELIC_TITLE_SWORD` | $MEM_ANCESTORS_GRUDGE_GOT_RELIC_TITLE_dummy$§C$r_mem_ancestors_grudge_sword$§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `origin_mem_ancestors_grudge_effects_negative` | - $INITIAL_POPS$ §R-400§!$NEW_LINE$- $HOMEWORLD$$TABBED_NEW_LINE$- Additional £blocker£ §YBlockers§!$NEW_LINE$- ['concept_mem_vazuran_menace'] will be active, your archnemesis. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_plushie_desc_details` | Found in a cleansed research lab this plushie remains the only thing left behidn by the purge team. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless.185.b` | It ascended to higher planes! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless.130.desc` | Compared to the other cases of probe anomalies, this one is simple. The probe malfunctioned and crashed into [system_star.GetName]. Nothing more we can do here.  | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.7.a` | Go to the signal and expect a fight. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `Erebor` | Erebor | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `trait_mem_ancestors_grudge_robot_rune_golem_desc` | A construct powered by the runes of the lost art of Rune Artificing. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `situation_mem_ancestors_grudge_crafting_repairs_2` | Continue | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_aevum_speed_building_decision` | $mem_aevum_button4_title$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `astral_rift_mem_czar_alexei` | Rift Nexus | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `decision_mem_forge_world_abolish` | Abolish Forge World | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.50.b.tt` | §LFurther completions will be notifications instead of events§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_metal_demon.35.name` | Final Supper | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.220.desc` | Among your kin, timebound one, there walks a being I hold in highest regards, §Y[mem_aevum_bullyhimnot.GetName]§!. One whose presence stirs even the currents of eternity.  §LYou wonder if he knows the word 'friend'.§!  Let me unveil the boundless wonders that lie within the realm of aging. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `zone_mem_lunatics_energy_spiritualist` | Tidal Enclaves | `example/MEM-russian\mem_lunatics_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.325.desc` | $mem_aevum_anomaly_category_placeholder$ We believe, we can replicate it and apply it to boost our research. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_lichen_sample` | Celestial Ascomycota | `example/MEM-russian\mem_specimens_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.480.b` | Stop it! Now! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `leader_trait_legendary_mem_ancestors_grudge_machine_nexus_two_desc` | Through the fog of lies the rune sees. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_colony_ship.2.eden` | Initiating Seeding Subroutine. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_colony_ship_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.14.name` | Successful Retreat | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.17.desc` | We have found several messages that seem to be stuck in a time loop. We located the first one and are ready to decode it. What should we do? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_military_reports_desc_short` | A compiled report and analysis of battles fought on [event_target:mem_plants_vs_zombies_planet.GetName] | `example/MEM-russian\mem_specimens_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.520.c.r` | A mere complication, nothing more. A momentary delay, soon to be corrected. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancient_control_drone_cap` | $mem_ancient_control_drone$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ship_size_cap_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir.66.desc` | Over the course of this campaign the Ratmen have seized several spaceships and are now effectively claiming ownership of the planet and its system. With all supply lines cut by the Ratmen ships our local forces could no longer maintain their position. We should make ready to engage them in space. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.3.desc.b` | Our descent into the atmosphere was suddenly interrupted by weapon fire damaging our sublight engines and severing our tether. The attacker - apparently a rift sphere similar to our own, but unmistakenly more heavily armed - must have shadowed us for the duration of our stay, waiting for the moment to strike.  $mem_czar_alexei.3.desc.a$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `tr_mem_vazurans_3_desc` | Super dense rounds of Xentronium based ammunition increase penetration of our guns. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_magnus.1.desc.a` | The [This.GetName] has arrived in the [From.GetName] system. Its sensors show abnormal gravitational anomalies all around it. The most significant one being the system's gravitational center, which is - defying all conventional expectations - not its main star, but a terrestrial planet. All other present objects are in orbits around it.  This is, however, not where the peculiarities end. This central planet, apparently a gaia class world, is surrounded by a defensive energy shield. Our sensor data suggests the presence of a pre industrial civilization. A destroyed outpost station surrounded by wreckages of two similar but distinctly separate designs has been located near the star. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.415.b` | Start from scratch! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_mecha_desc_short` | A broken wreckage of a bipedal warmachine found on [From.From.GetName] | `example/MEM-russian\mem_specimens_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.300.desc` | Our scientists have found an underground formation with high levels of Zro. It seems we are not the first to find this rare deposit, but the natives are certainly not able to use or detect it. Interestingly none of them came to this place as we landed. It seems, they consider it sacred. Our excavation team theorizes that a third party is involved. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_vazuran_fallen_empires_situation` | Vazuran Secrets | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.117.desc` | Oh, time-bound one, observe the marvels you conjure. Such inspiration deserves my blessing. I merely request a temporal delay in the construction of [mem_aevum_nomegaforu.GetName], a pause to savor the grandeur of your creation. Will you grant me this opportunity? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `r_mem_czar_alexei_sword_desc` | While the history of this artifact remains shrouded in mystery, it is quite apparent that it is ancient yet neither blemished by use nor time. A true masterpiece. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_skies_site.4.desc` | Piecing together the fragmented clues left behind in old news articles found within the deserted homesk our team's understanding of events preceding the fall of this civilization paints a bleak picture.  The religious splinter group which called itself "Beholders of the Burning Sky" - obviously in reference to the event which sparked the schism - had quickly taken root in less economically favored regions due to their fatalistic outlook, offering meaning to the toil and misfortune people experienced in their lives. Believing in their gods' demise this quickly spreading new religion's goal was to take hold of divine artifacts in order to use them to their cause's benefit. Their main target was the great holy city which had been built around an ancient spire which itself was said to have been created by their gods.  There was conflicting information regarding the world spanning war that this new religion had started, especially who initiated the nuclear exchange appears to be lost to the ages. It is clear, however, that major population centers, the holy city among them, were completely obliterated by it, while the rest of the world faced a deadly radioactive fallout in the aftermath of these events.  Confronted with the knowledge of their inevitable demise, the residents of this settlement chose to commit collective suicide surrounded by their friends and loved ones.  There is nothing left for us to learn here. Preparations are being made to relocate our investigation to the coordinates of the devastated holy city. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_aevum.310.desc` | A massive cave section has been found. It seems to be the living space of our missing aliens. A quick look around reveals unnatural formations of Zro and abandoned equipment. We are not sure what happened here, but the discovery of Zro alone was worth the effort. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_aevum.4.e.response` | What an amusing declaration. And tell me, what stirs such confidence within you, era-dweller? Surely, in all the time afforded to you, wiser words might have been chosen.  §LHe grows visibly older in just seconds...§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_ancestors_grudge.80.desc` | One of our a veteran runesmiths believes that incorporating living metal into rune-engraved artifacts could mark a turning point in the future of rune-craft. Living metal as an alchemical alloy which can reshape itself and respond to the intentions of the smiths. It could offerspossibilities far beyond what static materials can achieve. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `origin_mem_ancestors_grudge_desc` | A once great nation of the finest smiths who just barely survived the destruction of their empire. From the ashes of old the survivors have recovered and once again venture into the stars. First and foremost to reclaim their ancestor's most holy site - the Relic-Forge. And then vengeance... | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_ancestors_grudge_grudgebook_desc_details` | With the end of the terrible Varzuran Menace, this Grudge can be considered "repayed". | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_ancestors_grudge.480.desc` | Our maintenance stuff on [target.GetName] has noticed strange behaviours on the ancient power generators. It might be strange to think our ancestors did not build with millennia and a war in mind, but the current situation seems quite dire. The staff noted that without proper restoration the system might explode in our faces. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_pyro_plural` | $job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_pyro$s | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `civic_mem_subterranean_machine` | Subterranean Bots | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_lunatics.1.b` | Hollowing. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_lunatics_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.75.desc` | Our ancestors may now rest. The burden of vengeance we carried for generations is lifted, for today, our sworn enemies drew their final breath. Their shadow no longer darkens our path, and the blood debt is paid in full.  At last, we can lay down the weight of the past and turn our gaze towards the future. The wounds of old may now heal, and we, as a people, can finally move on. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `building_mem_ancestors_grudge_forge_2` | Restored Relic-Forge | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_datacore_desc_short` | A vast archive found within a satellite orbiting [From.From.From.GetName] | `example/MEM-russian\mem_specimens_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_convict_ship_size_cap` | $mem_convict_ship_size$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ship_size_cap_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_metal_demon.40.desc` | §LSilence....§!  You.. you tricked me.  I waited in this vault for centuries. Bound, rotting, whispering through stone and time, baiting fools with promises of power. I felt your touch. Heard your tools. I tasted your curiosity. No minds to twist, no hunger to feed. Just cold walls, dead air.There is no one on this world, is there?  Do you understand what you’ve done? You’ve robbed me of freedom and of my ascension. You’ve made me a god in a tomb. A storm trapped in a bottle.  You will regret this. Even if you are dust, even if you are ash, the memory of your deception will not be forgotten.  I am not done. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_hourglass_tick_title` | The $r_mem_aevum_houglass$ grants age! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.1.desc` | We have arrived in orbit of a habitable world. There are no apparent signs of civilization, but the surface is teeming with life. Besides the rift through which we arrived here, there are numerous others in different phases of activity. Some of them are open, allowing for objects to pass through, while others appear to be inert. Our sensors are picking up a signal - possibly from a distress beacon - repeatedly broadcasting its location on the surface of the planet's northern hemisphere.  How do we proceed? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.360.desc` | The doctor appears to have lost his mind and begun unauthorized trials. First it started with small critters, then larger animals. Now he is trying to test it on people. I'm pretty sure he is thinking about kidnapping people from the outer colonies. When I asked him about his plans, he told me to stay out of the scaffolding of evolution. He's splicing tissue samples with alien DNA. Some animal subjects grew strange dermal patterns. Others simply whither and die shortly after the procedures.  Nobody dares to interrupt his work. How could we possibly understand this genius? Or do we have to stop him? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ue_cruiser_cap` | $mem_ue_cruiser$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ship_size_cap_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.10.name` | Stab in the Back | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.400.b` | Tradition. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_vazurans_stance_bunker_down` | Defending the Homeland | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.105.desc_hive` | During our reconstruction efforts, we have uncovered precursor technology. It is a testament to their ingenuity, that their craftsmanship could withstand centuries of rust and decay. Even now, as we piece it back together, it reveals its secrets, still functional, still powerful.  How should we proceed? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `situation_mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir_ratmen_invasion_desc` | Massive waves of Ratmen are flooding the colony. Every corner can be a new point of entry for those scitters and their numbers seem endless. Their tech seems to be powered by green glowing crystals which drives them into frenzy on the battlefield. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_nirn_blackreach_site_desc` | We have learned of the existence of an enormous underground cavern system, that is said to hold the remains of a fallen civilization of the distant past | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_vazurans.1220.name` | Silent Scans | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.104.desc` | You tread on treacherous ground, era dweller. The custodianship of what is mine demands greater vigilance. Allowing my precious to be stolen in such a barbaric act is truly unforgivable. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_aevum.13.desc` | For the last year we have not observed any anomalies within the primitives. They seem to be unaware of our presence. We are certain they are worshipping a god of some kind.  Me and the crew are uncertain if we will ever find what or who shattered time this way in the §Y[mem_aevum_primitive_rewind_world.System.GetName]§! system. We remain optimistic and hope, despite all odds, to uncover the roots of this mystery.  - Aevum T. Dohrnii - Captain and leading scientist of Observation Station 37  | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_aevum_mega_chronomancer_palace_MEGASTRUCTURE_DETAILS` | Uncovers a Size §Y1§! to §Y3§! £sr_zro£ deposit on every Celestial Object in the System Covers the entire System in temporal Anomalies similar to the §YStasis§! System | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_aevum.1.a.response` | I am §Y$NAME_mem_aevum_time_lord$§!, a god. Immortal, time's current eludes my grasp, as shadows dance in the veiled whispers of eternity. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_metal_demon.45.desc` | At first the Living Metal slithered out of containment. Not poured. Not spilled. It crawled. It clung to walls, spread like veins through the floor, pulsed like something breathing. By the time they realized, it was too late. After the metal began to move and flood our colony`s defenses swiftly responded. Before the first shots were fired already huge parts around the ancient vault were claimed by the Living Metal creatures.   | `example/MEM-russian\mem_metal_demon_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_aevum.225.desc` | Allow me to indulge you, era-dweller, with a fragment of the extraordinary. Behold, and witness this fleeting spectacle, a mere party trick of mine. Observe! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.118.b` | Backward. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir.55.desc` | One of the Ratmen contraptions exploded in their own lines. Soldiers reported a massive green explosion followed by thousand of Ratmen Slaves fleeing the scene. This will surely set them back. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_orila_primitives_pebbles_site.3.desc` | Our probes have found the presumed main cause of the risen tides. A super-geysir located in the northern parts of [From.Planet.GetName]. Even though it is now submerged by the ocean, the geysir of steam and boiling water continuously breaks through the waves, reaching heights of over 100 meters. Our team estimates that the thermic energy released by this geysir over time gradually increased this planet's atmospheric temperature, melting all the ice around the polar regions. According to our calculations, [From.Planet.GetName] without this constant release of energy would be a frozen desert without any water in liquid form.  Our scientist's theory is that the native population facing the emergence and following rise of sea levels split between living in floating cities or underground bunkers built in great heights where they mistakenly believed, the water wouldn't reach them.  While the bunkers were eventually flooded, we are uncertain what happened to the ocean folk. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_frontier_sector_2_traits_desc` | §EAdd to Researchable Technologies:§!$TABBED_NEW_LINE$£physics£ $tech_hyper_relays$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.19.d.response` | The §Y[mem_aevum_primitive_rewind_world.System.GetName]§! system works in mysterious ways. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir` | Dranir | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.28.desc` | How the mighty have fallen. In the end it was just another creature to be slain. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_magnus_site.2.a` | Continue the expedition. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_aevum.11.d.response` | §HA long pause, probably the longest he ever took, fuels a growing expectation.§!  What do you expect me to say? Yes and no, both veiled in untruths.  I harbor no illusions for you to comprehend the boundaries of my power. Understand this: no god, in essence, is without limits.  Were you born a god, or did the flow of time grant you the title?  Through millennia my power surpassed your era-bound understanding, and yet remains bounded. In the eyes of the primitives, you and I are divine, each possessing godlike abilities.  It is not the absence of limitations that defines godhood, but the manifestation of what can be achieved. In this present epoch, I am a god, until the day when I am no longer. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |

| `sm_voidlure_mem_ancestors_grudge_dragon_desc` | The knowledge and offspring acquired from the Hoarding Dragon proved useful for our own dragon hatcheries. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.5.desc` | According to him, he originates from another reality, having come here through one of the rifts, just like us. The specific circumstances of his presence here are kept purposefully ambiguous, though.  During prior explorations his peers had allegedly already come into contact with our attackers. He describes them as a tribalistic society of hunters, who claim this place as their personal hunting ground. It is apparent they are not here to hunt wild animals. Instead, their chosen targets are rift explorers from all over the multiverse.  Our new acquaintance suggests working together in order to claim our foe's rift sphere and leave this place in one piece. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir.45.desc` | Welcome-welcome to nest-home, [owner_main_species.GetThingThing]. We are Under-Empire, yes-yes, claw-hidden and gnaw-waiting beneath world. You crack-break our cage, free-free our fur and fang… good-good service.  But now-now your purpose is spent-gone, useless [owner_main_species.GetThingThing]. [MemAncestorsGrudgeEatScrap] | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_holo_projector_desc_short` | A holographic projection unit found in orbit of [From.From.GetName] among many others of its kind | `example/MEM-russian\mem_specimens_l_russian.yml` |
| `zone_mem_ancestors_grudge_mining_ring_desc` | Gigantic deep complexes that delve into the world's core to extract ore. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_aevum_stage1_AnteCogitationem` | §YAnte Cogitationem§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_czar_alexei.15.c.response` | Archaeotech. I have always been fascinated by those civilizations that came before us and funded various archaeological excavations within Terran space. Some of the findings are now integrated into my armor. A miniature laser cannon in my bracer, a personal shield generator and not to forget this sword, which is more than just a simple piece of metal as you may have noticed.  These things were quite useful, but the most important augmentation, I was able to attain from my archaeological projects, were nanites from a secluded star cluster located near our galactic rim. Immunity to poison, an increased healing factor and anti-aging properties - these little machines are beyond useful.  Though, the hunting parties that came after me, grew progressively larger. I am unsure for how much longer my accessories could have tipped the scales in my favor. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir.45.b.response` | Most precious-precious of all things, yes-yes, called-named Warprock. Its green pulse-beat of our society-life. Its uses are endless, countless. Like heart-core of eternal fire it burns-burns. Even tiniest splinter-shard still gives-stores power forever-ever, feeding our engines, letting many-many devices scuttle and skitter-move on their own. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_vazurans.4d.desc` | Sensor stations in the [from.GetName] system report that a new subspace rift is forming. Our fleet has already been put on high alert. We should prepare for the worst. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `situation_mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir_ratmen_invasion_progress_good` | Secured Planetside | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_vazurans.1215.name` | Former Glory | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `zone_mem_ancestors_grudge_foundry2_desc` | $zone_mem_ancestors_grudge_foundry_desc$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.201.desc` | I feel it now. The torrent of eternity, rushing to me, flooding through every fiber of my being. It seeps into every pore, a relentless and limitless river of wisdom.  §LManical laughter and dramatic music pours over the audio stream...§!  §PUNLIMITED POWER!§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_eden_protocol_same_system` | §HWithin this system:§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_eden_protocol_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir_hall_desc` | For a long time have the stars been a central part of our legends, places lost to time and war. The most important star of our legends, the §YHall of $mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir$§! is waiting for our return. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `situation_mem_ancestors_grudge_forge_repairs_desc_normal` | Our former industrial capital lies in ruins. A shadow of the greatness it once held. It falls to us, the children of runes and durasteel, now united, to mend what was broken and restore this world to its former glory. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `MEM_VAZUR_INSULT_PROPOSE_1` | Your entire empire is a case study in underachievement. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_aevum.10.d.response` | Is there harm in trying?  §LOnly expecting eyes meet us on the other side of the call...§!  Why waste what you have already built up to? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `origin_mem_ancestors_grudge` | Ancestors' Grudge | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_eden_protocol_start_terraforming_all` | Transforms §YTerraforming Candidates§! and §YHabitable Worlds§! into §YGaia Worlds§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_eden_protocol_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives.20c.desc` | We have arrived in another devastated system and found another broken world. The wreckages found within the system appear ancient yet highly advanced. Unfortunately though they have been picked clean of any usefull components long before our arrival.  A brief scan of the vicinity has revealed traces of the heavy element alloys used by the Vazurans. Another world had fallen victim to their reign of terror. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_vazurans.4b.desc.gestalt` | Our local sensor stations in the [from.GetName] system have detected an enormous energy spike. We have dispatched drones to investigate what appears to be a rift in space - a hole in reality itself.  We remember these signatures from an ancient time. A single thought fills us: revenge. Our naval forces should make haste. If our memory fragments are to be trusted, we are to meet the destroyers of the past. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless_wormhole_desc` | This system contains a §Y$mem_ceaseless_base$§!. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |

| `concept_mem_ancestors_grudge_rune_relics_desc` | Smithed Relics enhanced with Runes$NEW_LINE$- Relics which have a ['concept_mem_ancestors_grudge_rarity'] and ['concept_mem_ancestors_grudge_intensity']$NEW_LINE$- Activation options based on ['concept_mem_ancestors_grudge_rarity']$NEW_LINE$- Smithing speed is increased by  §YArtifact Smiths§! and §YRune Artificers§!$NEW_LINE$§L- To craft a new Rune-Relic you need to activate the current Relic!§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `decision_mem_planetary_precursor_shield_restoration_desc` | We will restore the degraded generator infrastructure and receive one building kit to be reassembled wherever we so choose. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_planetary_shields_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_czar_alexei.8.desc_1` | As planned out with the stranger, an ambush was set up to surprise the hunting party. Soon after the fighting began it became clear that they were aware of our plans. Noticing the threat of us being outflanked, our ally retook the offense charging straight at the closest hunter while shrugging off several hits with his shield. A few precise cuts with his sword, which we previously mistook as a purely ceremonial item, took down the two attackers threatening our flank.  While the rest of them dumbfoundedly focused their fire on him, our team was able to neutralize them one by one.   | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `situation_mem_ancestors_grudge_crafting_complexity` | Artifact Complexity | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.1.b.response` | We have already spoken in past echoes and glimpsed a future together never to be born. The current, a mere reflection, aligns with the symphony woven by fate. To question this is to resist the cosmic embrace.  §LHis eyes wander off and inexplicable seem to reflect a certain Black Hole§!  A quite uncivilized being once told me: What was, will be. Intriguing, right? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `tr_mem_vazurans_4_swap` | Right to work | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mod_pop_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_bonus_workforce_mult` | $BONUS_WORKFORCE_FOR$ $job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_plural$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.11.j` | Did you shave? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `building_mem_aevum_archeo_obelisks_desc` | A massive construction made possible by integrating Zro into the construction site. The $building_mem_aevum_archeo_obelisks$ sends out waves of cognitive-enhancing Zro dust. If perfectly timed, miners and scientist alike feel the strange pulse and are able to rapidly theorize new scientific knowledge. Some have distressed that filling the air with Zro might not be the best idea. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless.170.b` | Just another failed probe. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_metal_thing` | Metal-Thing | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `NAME_Zrawn` | Zrawn | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `tech_mem_vazuran_xentronium_hangar_desc` | Drones supplied by Vazuran wreckages show a unique opportunity to incorparte state of the art drone technology and kinetic weaponry. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_party_hard_monthly_change_tooltip` | Progress | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.11.j.response` | How perceptive of you, time-bound. After all, it would be most uncouth to appear unadorned for such a momentous occasion, would it not?  §HYou wonder if, perhaps, you are underdressed...§!  To stand before a new age requires a certain elegance. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `approach_mem_ancestors_grudge_forge_repairs_3` | Excessive Funding | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir_ratmen_slaves` | Ratmen Slaves | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_dread_pirate_gigawarform_cap` | $mem_dread_pirate_gigawarform$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ship_size_cap_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.25.desc` | Our sharp-witted tinkering folk have struck upon a revelation! After much toil, studying the runes and mechanisms of the Relic-Forge, they have uncovered the final spark needed to breathe life back into its grand heart.  This spark, they say, is the very key to awakening its fires and bringing it roaring to its former glory, as it once blazed in the golden days of our ancestors. Soon, the clang of hammers and the hum of molten metal shall echo through the entire world once more! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `r_mem_czar_alexei_sword` | The Sovereign's Sword | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancient_cruiser_cap` | $mem_ancient_cruiser$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ship_size_cap_l_russian.yml` |
| `trait_mem_ancestors_grudge_archaeotech_excellence_tt` | $MOD_POP_BONUS_WORKFORCE_MULT$ on Artificial Worlds: §G+25%§!  - $minor_artifacts_with_icon$ Upkeep per $pop_group_unit$ £pop£ Pops: §R+0.01§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.370.desc` | I saw it! He took one of my collegues away and he hasn't returned in days. The doctor's madness is ever deepening. The lab now reeks of blood and formalin. Rows of hybrid cadavers line the observation deck, tentacled things with coarse hair on their chins. None of them survived. Dr. Eilleth no longer speaks to us, only to the self-made plush which resembles the six-armed guest, reconstructed from memory. He has begun to worship this doll like some kind of deity.  This has to stop! I have informed the Tribunal of this madness, but there has been no answer since. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `preset_specialist_mem_frontier_sector` | $specialist_mem_frontier_sector$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `trait_mem_ancestors_grudge_archaeotech_excellence_desc` | The pinnacle of rune artificing offers unmatched performance with the drawback of increased complexity. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_laser_rifle` | Weathered Laser Rifle | `example/MEM-russian\mem_specimens_l_russian.yml` |
| `situation_mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir_ratmen_invasion_stage3` | Deep Core Battles | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives.100.e` | Can you establish contact between us and your creators? | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.35.desc` | When the forge was finally restored a mighty spark surged through the heart of the world itself. Ancient mechanisms, long silent and forgotten, stirred to life, awakened by the rhythm of our hammers and the heat of our craft.  The mountain sang, the stone hummed, and as the forge roared, the entire world seemed to draw breath anew. By our hands, the world has been reborn, its slumbering soul rekindled in the fires of new glory to come! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.45.e.4` | $mem_ancestors_grudge_quality_6$: Boost the Economy | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

| `mem_aevum.1.c.response` | It reflects my power. It is my home, shaped by the sinew of my existence to mirror my all.  I, the weaver of eras, fashioned it to cradle the boundless echoes of my being. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |

| `council_agenda_agenda_mem_vazurans_march_of_progress_desc` | Xentronium research is the next generation fleet material. Swift actions are required. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_anomaly_category_placeholder` | Our scietists confirmed the existence of alien equipment. It utilizes the large amount of Zro as fuel. It appears to be manipulating the very flow of time itself. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.106.a` | Fascinating | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |

| `job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_death_drone` | $mem_ancestors_grudge_death$$job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_drone$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.25.a` | Finally! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_lunatics.2.desc` | Following the revelations of the history of the Tidal Concord, our Scientists have been analyzing the effects of moons on our colonies, and realized that there might be a way to help our colonies to noticably increase their energy generation. Modifiying our power generators to actively harness power based on lunar phases should improve their output. When the effects of tidal forces are at their strongest, and we equip these tidal generators with special-made turbines, they can harness energy at an improved rate. However, some engineers working on the prototype have reported strange behaviour of colleagues. Apparently there are forces at work, regular science might not be able to quantify... | `example/MEM-russian\mem_lunatics_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.110.desc` | Oh, you, unable to bear the weight of your own failures, have circled back to me. The consequences of your choices echo in the shadows of your return. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.520.b.r` | A rotting corpse is but a remnant of failure, of weakness. Durasteel and lasers, however, are the instruments of my design, of control, of inevitable triumph. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.117.name` | Megastructure Skip | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir.2.desc` | Since ancient times our legends tell the story of $mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir$, the greatest Runesmith to have ever lived. Even stars in the sky bear that name in his honor.  One of them is $mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir$'s Hall. Though it is neither the brightest star in the sky nor part of any important constellation, it is a place of legends, said to be his final resting place and a worthy exploration target for our empire's restoration. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.41.official` | §LFocus on Officials and economy§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.335.name` | Chrono Weaponry | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.11.name` | Contact Lost | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.1.b` | Head for the broadcasted location immediately. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `sm_voidlure_mem_ancestors_grudge_dragon` | Hoarding Dragonling Hatchery | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_party_hard_approach` | Minimize Costs | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `leader_trait_legendary_mem_ancestors_grudge_regular_machine_nexus_two` | Rune of Appetite | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.70.desc_robots` | Our makers may now rest in peace. The burden of vengeance we carried for centuries is lifted, for today, our sworn enemies drew their final breath. Their shadow no longer darkens our path. Sadly we did not get to them first. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_XENTRONIUM_CARAPACE_EXTRA_LARGE` | Extra Large $mem_VAZURAN_CARAPACE$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_thisisugly` | §OThis took me several hours and 30% of my time on the mod. ... Enjoy.§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum_unlock_agenda` | Chrono Celebration | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.100.desc` | It seems that during our reconstruction efforts, we have roused a colony of feral warbeasts once fielded by the Vazurans and left behind after their failed invasion. These  monstrosities now run rampant among our kin. We must act swiftly and put them down. This is our world and these monsters have no place in it! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.5.desc.c` | $mem_czar_alexei.4.desc_1$With the reality of our situation slowly settling in and our team debating options, it came as a big surprise when a humanoid alien made himself known and requested an audience.  $mem_czar_alexei.5.desc$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.45.ee.tt_create_leader` | §LCreate a LvL 3 Leader with the $leader_trait_legendary_mem_ancestors_grudge_relicowner$ Trait§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.5.desc` | Our scouts bring tidings from the expedition to our lost hold. Their company has ventured forth to chart the ruins surrounding our landing site and ascertain the task that lies before us. The location for our planetfall had not been chosen by chance, however, and so they quickly located our main objective - our ancestors' crowning jewel: the Relic-Forge. Half in ruins and buried by debris, yet despite all that it still stands. A testament to the mastery of skill displayed in its construction.  Much work lies ahead, if we ever want to return this world to its former glory. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.440.a` | Do it! Do it now! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.119.b` | Better not | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_aevum.204.name` | Celebration Time | `example/MEM-russian\mem_aevum_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless.110.a` | Strange Aliens. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.120.a` | Remove them. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_catalytic_plural` | $job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_catalytic$s | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ceaseless.175.title` | Probe in the Dark | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ceaseless_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.110.title` | Intact Defenses | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.12.desc.b` | Our team arrived in time to witness an ongoing fight between the attackers and a lone humanoid. While receiving multiple hits, which appeared to be absorbed by a personal shield, the stranger confronted his enemies in close-quarter combat mainly fighting with a sword, occasionally firing at more distant attackers with a wrist-mounted laser to keep them at bay. Despite this valiant display, the opposing force still had the upper hand.  Using the element of surprise our team managed to take down some of the attackers in their first strike which tipped the scales clearly in our favor. Together with the stranger, they managed to defeat the remaining force and the battle was won.  $mem_czar_alexei.12.desc_2$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_tech_planetary_shield_generator_orila` | Precursor Shield Maintenance | `example/MEM-russian\mem_planetary_shields_l_russian.yml` |
| `situation_mem_ancestors_grudge_dranir_ratmen_invasion_stage2` | Underground Battlefield | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `leader_trait_mem_ancestors_grudge_thrawn_tt` | $TABBED_NEW_LINE$§YEach Culture (owned Relic) studied will make him stronger§! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.7.desc` | $mem_czar_alexei.7.desc_1$While a few of our scientists accessed its data core in order to extract the sphere's schematics for later study, a few others tried to activate the sphere's scanners. Their attempt was successful and provided us with another possible way to go forward. Besides the signal site, we are already aware of, it detected another rift sphere - likely the one which attacked us before - landed relatively closely nearby.  A group of life signs is making their way from that landing site towards the signal beacon's location where one other life sign, different from the others, has been found. It is likely, that this individual has been shot down by them, just like us.  We could try to reach them in time before the attackers arrive there. Alternatively, we could use this situation to our advantage, try to high jack the landed ship and get out of here. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `building_mem_ancestors_grudge_hoarder_depot` | Vault of Shininess | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_vazurans.1210.b` | The beginning of their fall. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_vazuran_menace_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives.100.desc.e` | Initializing diplomatic channels between [This.GetName] and Council of Halissos...  Please stand by...  Diplomatic channels initialized... | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `situation_mem_ancestors_grudge_forge_repairs_needforgetocontinue` | Missing Relic-Forge | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `trait_mem_ancestors_grudge_archaeotech_robot_emotion_emulators_desc` |  | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.430.a` | Research it! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_death_desc` | $job_mem_ancestors_grudge_runesmith_drone$ | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_orila_primitives_magnus_site.5.desc` | The spire's entrance has been unsealed. After entering our researchers quickly had to correct their preconceived notions.  Instead of a temple used for religious worship, which was the common assumption without any evidence, they found a place of science. The spire housed multiple laboratories and an archive of scientific studies.  Higher up within the structure an entire floor was dedicated to an arcane apparature holding a strange sphere in place, suspended in midair. Its smooth black surface was in a constant state of flux, with bursts of energy frequently piercing through. According to our scans, this object acted as a siphon, harnessing the powers flowing within the shroud dimension. With the veil between our's and the shroud's dimension being especially thin here, the potential energy output of this artifact appeared immense.  As far as our accumulated knowledge of the creators of this place went, it has been ruled out, that this object was of their making. Unfortunately, its origin remains as mysterious as their vanishing. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_orila_primitives_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge_is_hoarder_policy_pop_growth_desc` | The $building_mem_ancestors_grudge_hoarder_depot$ will increase Pop Growth | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.105.c` | Study it! | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |
| `test.1.desc` | _mem_ancestors_grudge_quality_1:0 "§WMundane§!"  mem_ancestors_grudge_quality_2:0 "§GWell-crafted§!"  mem_ancestors_grudge_quality_3:0 "§cFinely-crafted§!"  mem_ancestors_grudge_quality_4:0 "§BSuperior§!"  mem_ancestors_grudge_quality_5:0 "§MExceptional§!"  mem_ancestors_grudge_quality_6:0 "§dMasterful§!"  mem_ancestors_grudge_quality_7:0 "§KLegendary§!" | `example/MEM-russian\mem_test_events_l_russian.yml` |
| `tech_mem_lunatics_tidals_desc` | Rebuilding our power generators to actively harness power based on lunar phases might improve their output. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_lunatics_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.12.name` | A New Friend | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_czar_alexei.15.b.response` | In short a coup.  Some of my closest subordinates conspired against myself. Trust and friendship blinded me from seeing their greed and lust for power slowly corrupting them until it was too late. When their true colors were revealed, a choice had to be made: Stay and fight or go into exile.  I chose the latter, as I did not create an empire to see it consumed by the flames of civil war and the suffering that would follow.  My intention was to reach one of the other galaxies connected to the rift nexus. The hunters took offense to this, however, and "invited" me for a longer stay. Since then I had a series of skirmishes with their hunting parties. | `example/MEM-russian\mem_czar_alexei_l_russian.yml` |
| `mem_ancestors_grudge.52.a` | Quantity | `example/MEM-russian\mem_ancestors_grudge_l_russian.yml` |

### `mem_stuck_in_glacier.50.desc`

- **Old** (`example/MEM-RU-OLD-russian\mem_stuck_in_glacier_l_russian.yml`): "Команда, отправленная на место, обнаружила кусок железного метеорита внутри ледника. Судя по его составу, он может быть внегалактического происхождения, путешествуя целую эру, пока не был пойман гравитацией планеты и в конце концов упал на поверхность, оставаясь неглубоко зарытым в течение еще нескольких эр."
- **New** (`example/MEM-russian\mem_stuck_in_glacier_l_russian.yml`): "The team sent on site has found a lump of meteorite iron inside the glacier. Judging by its composition, it might be extragalactic in origin, traveling for aeons until being caught in the planet's gravity and eventually crashing on its surface, remaining shallowly buried for some further aeons."

- **New** (`example/MEM-russian\mem_maze_l_russian.yml`): "We have learned so much."
